28816.title: A Quantitative Framework for Analyzing the Distributional Effects of Incentive Schemes
28816.zh_title: 分析激励方案分配效应的量化框架
28816.authors: Hugh Macartney, Robert McMillan, Uros Petronijevic
28816.abstract: This paper develops the first quantitative framework for analyzing distributional effects of incentive schemes in public education. The analysis is built around a hump-shaped effort function, estimated semi-parametrically using exogenous incentive variation and rich administrative data. We identify key primitives that rationalize this effort function by estimating a flexible teacher effort-choice model. Both the model and parameter estimates are necessary components in our counterfactual framework for tracing the effects of alternative accountability systems on the entire test score distribution, with effort adjusting endogenously. We find widespread schemes that set a fixed target for all students give rise to a steep performance-inequality tradeoff. Further, counterfactual incentive policies can outperform existing schemes for the same cost — reducing the black-white test score gap by 7% (via student-specific bonuses), and lowering test-score inequality across students by 90% (via student-specific targets). Our quantitative approach opens up new possibilities for incentive design in practice.
28816.zh_abstract: 本文开发了第一个用于分析公共教育中激励方案分配效应的量化框架。该分析围绕一个驼峰形的努力函数构建，该函数利用外生的激励变化和丰富的行政数据进行半参数估计。我们通过估计一个灵活的教师努力选择模型，识别出使该努力函数合理化的关键原始参数。该模型和参数估计都是我们反事实框架的必要组成部分，该框架用于追踪替代问责制度对整个考试成绩分布的影响，其中努力会内生调整。我们发现，为所有学生设定固定目标的普遍方案会产生陡峭的成绩-不平等权衡。此外，反事实的激励政策可以在相同成本下优于现有方案——通过学生特定奖金将黑人与白人之间的考试成绩差距缩小7%，并通过学生特定目标将学生间的考试成绩不平等降低90%。我们的量化方法为实践中激励设计开辟了新的可能性。
28816.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：D82, I21, J33, M52

28815.title: Human Capitalists
28815.authors: Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Antonio Falato, Mindy Z. Xiaolan
28815.abstract: The widespread and growing use of equity-based compensation has transformed high-skilled labor from a pure labor input to a class of “human capitalists.” High-skilled labor earns substantial income in the form of equity claims to firms’ future dividends and capital gains. Equity-based compensation has increased substantially since the 1980s, representing thirty-six percent of total compensation to high-skilled labor in US manufacturing in recent years. Ignoring equity income causes incorrect measurement of the returns to high-skilled labor, with substantial effects on macroeconomic trends. In manufacturing, the inclusion of equity-based compensation almost eliminates the decline in the high-skilled labor share, and reduces the total decline in the labor share by about one-third. Only by including equity pay does our structural estimation support complementarity between high-skilled labor and physical capital greater than that of Cobb and Douglas (1928). We also provide additional regression evidence of such complementarity.
28815.zh_abstract: 基于股权的薪酬的广泛且不断增长的使用，已将高技能劳动力从纯粹的劳动投入转变为一类“人力资本家”。高技能劳动力以对公司未来股息和资本收益的股权索取权形式获得大量收入。自1980年代以来，基于股权的薪酬大幅增加，近年来占美国制造业高技能劳动力总薪酬的36%。忽略股权收入会导致对高技能劳动力回报的错误衡量，并对宏观经济趋势产生重大影响。在制造业中，纳入基于股权的薪酬几乎消除了高技能劳动力份额的下降，并使劳动力份额的总下降减少了约三分之一。只有通过纳入股权薪酬，我们的结构估计才支持高技能劳动力与物质资本之间的互补性大于科布和道格拉斯（1928）所提出的互补性。我们还提供了这种互补性的额外回归证据。

28814.title: What Can Developing Cities Today Learn From the Urban Past?
28814.zh_title: 当今发展中城市能从城市历史中学到什么？
28814.abstract: The downsides of density, including traffic congestion, contagious disease and crime, were common in Victorian London and classical Rome, just as they are today in Sao Paulo and Lagos. Our urban past provides lessons for developing world cities today. The first lesson, that I highlight, is that political power, not commerce, has long driven the growth of the world’s largest cities, and that fact remains true for many developing world mega-cities today. The second lesson is that while market access fundamentally shaped the cities of the past, the power of transport to determine urban fortunes has declined. Transportation infrastructure no longer transforms cities unless it is accompanied by complementary investments, such as education. The third lesson is that infrastructure, such as sewers and roads, functions best when combined with incentives, which can ensure the adoption of sewers and discourage the abuse of highways. The fourth lesson is that the development of many western cities relied on a nexus of property rights for landowners, including the right to build, buy, alienate, mortgage and rent, that are far more limited in many developing world cities. The fifth lesson is that there is a menu of institutions for managing infrastructure, including direct public control, independent public authorities and public private partnerships. Local conditions, especially the level of public capacity, will determine the best choice among those institutions.
28814.zh_abstract: 密度的负面影响，包括交通拥堵、传染病和犯罪，在维多利亚时代的伦敦和古典时代的罗马很常见，就像今天在圣保罗和拉各斯一样。我们的城市历史为当今发展中国家的城市提供了教训。我强调的第一个教训是，长期以来，政治权力而非商业驱动了世界最大城市的增长，这一事实对于当今许多发展中国家的特大城市仍然成立。第二个教训是，虽然市场准入从根本上塑造了过去的城市，但交通决定城市命运的力量已经减弱。除非伴随着互补性投资（如教育），否则交通基础设施不再能改变城市。第三个教训是，基础设施（如下水道和道路）在与激励措施相结合时效果最佳，这可以确保下水道的采用并阻止对高速公路的滥用。第四个教训是，许多西方城市的发展依赖于土地所有者的一系列产权，包括建造、购买、转让、抵押和出租的权利，而这些权利在许多发展中国家的城市中受到的限制要大得多。第五个教训是，存在一套管理基础设施的制度选择，包括直接公共控制、独立公共机构和公私合作伙伴关系。地方条件，特别是公共能力水平，将决定这些制度中的最佳选择。

28813.title: The Changing Relationship between Bodyweight and Longevity in High- and Low-Income Countries
28813.zh_title: 高收入与低收入国家中体重与长寿之间关系的变化
28813.authors: Joanna Aleksandra Kopinska, Vincenzo Atella, Jay Bhattacharya, Grant Miller
28813.abstract: Standard measures of bodyweight (overweight and obese, for example) fail to reflect technological progress over time - and in particular, recent progress disproportionately promoting longevity at higher bodyweights (and differences in access to it). This paper builds on the pioneering work of Hans Waaler (Waaler, 1984) and Robert Fogel (Fogel, 1994) to empirically estimate how technological progress, and differential access to it, have fundamentally transformed the relationship between body mass index (BMI) and longevity in high-, middle-, and low-income countries. Importantly, we show that the combined effect of technological progress and access to it across countries is so profound that the share of national populations above mortality-minimizing bodyweight is not clearly greater in countries with higher overweight and obesity rates (as traditionally defined) - and in fact, relative to current standards, a larger share of low-income countries’ populations can be unhealthily heavy.
28813.zh_abstract: 衡量体重的标准指标（例如超重和肥胖）未能反映随时间推移的技术进步——特别是近期在较高体重水平上不成比例地促进长寿的进步（以及获取这些进步的差异）。本文基于Hans Waaler（Waaler, 1984）和Robert Fogel（Fogel, 1994）的开创性工作，通过实证估计技术进步以及获取技术进步机会的差异如何从根本上改变了高收入、中等收入和低收入国家中身体质量指数（BMI）与长寿之间的关系。重要的是，我们表明，技术进步及其在不同国家获取机会的综合效应如此深远，以至于在超重和肥胖率（按传统定义）较高的国家中，其国民中体重超过死亡率最小化体重的比例并不明显更高——事实上，相对于当前标准，低收入国家中有更大比例的人口可能处于不健康的超重状态。

28812.title: US Immigrants' Secondary Migration and Geographic Assimilation during the Age of Mass Migration
28812.zh_title: 大规模移民时期美国移民的二次迁移与地理同化
28812.abstract: I study the rates of, selection into, and sorting of European immigrants' secondary migration within the United States and their geographic assimilation during the Age of Mass Migration. These phenomena are recognized as important components of the economics of immigration, but data constraints have limited prior study of them in this context. As part of the debate over immigrant distribution, they were also major issues in the broader twentieth-century immigration policy debate, which were influenced by the widely held view that immigrants in the early twentieth century were less geographically mobile and specifically more attached to urban areas than were natives and earlier immigrants. I find that immigrants throughout the Age of Mass Migration were at least as likely as natives to make inter-county moves, were more attached to urban areas, were more likely to move to urban destinations, and shared natives' increasing attachment to urban areas over time. In spite of their mobility, immigrants experienced relatively little assimilation in their place-of-residence distributions relative to natives with time in the United States, though they did experience somewhat more convergence on natives in terms of urbanization. These results help to better understand immigrant assimilation and the effects of immigration during the Age of Mass Migration and imply that the contemporary views of immigrant immobility were either false, oversimplified, or the product of changes in the US economy.
28812.zh_abstract: 我研究了大规模移民时期欧洲移民在美国境内的二次迁移率、选择性及分类，以及他们的地理同化现象。这些现象被认为是移民经济学的重要组成部分，但数据限制限制了此前在此背景下的研究。作为关于移民分布争论的一部分，它们也是更广泛的20世纪移民政策辩论中的主要议题，这些辩论受到一种普遍观点的影响，即20世纪初的移民在地理上不如本土出生者和早期移民流动，尤其更倾向于定居在城市地区。我发现，在整个大规模移民时期，移民进行跨县迁移的可能性至少与本土出生者相当，他们更倾向于城市地区，更可能迁往城市目的地，并且随着时间的推移，与本土出生者一样越来越依恋城市地区。尽管移民具有流动性，但他们在美国的居住地分布相对于本土出生者的同化程度相对较小，尽管他们在城市化方面确实与本土出生者有一定程度的趋同。这些结果有助于更好地理解大规模移民时期的移民同化及移民影响，并表明当时关于移民缺乏流动性的观点要么是错误的，要么过于简化，要么是美国经济变化的产物。
28812.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：F22, J11, J15, J61, N31, N32, R23

28811.title: AI Adoption and System-Wide Change
28811.zh_title: 人工智能采纳与系统范围变革
28811.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
28811.abstract: Analyses of AI adoption focus on its adoption at the individual task level. What has received significantly less attention is how AI adoption is shaped by the fact that organisations are composed of many interacting tasks. AI adoption may, therefore, require system-wide change which is both a constraint and an opportunity. We provide the first formal analysis where multiple tasks may be part of a modular or non-modular system. We find that reliance on AI, a prediction tool, increases decision variation which, in turn, raises challenges if decisions across the organisation interact. Modularity, which leads to task independence rather than system-level inter-dependencies, softens that impact. Thus, modularity can facilitate AI adoption. However, it does this at the expense of synergies. By contrast, when there are mechanisms for inter-decision coordination, AI adoption is enhanced when there is a non-modular environment. Consequently, we show that there are important cases where AI adoption will be enhanced when it can be adopted beyond tasks but as part of a designed organisational system.
28811.zh_abstract: 对人工智能采纳的分析聚焦于其在单个任务层面的采纳。但人工智能采纳如何受到组织由众多相互作用的任务构成这一事实的影响，受到的关注要少得多。因此，人工智能的采纳可能需要系统范围的变革，这既是约束也是机遇。我们首次提供了多任务可能属于模块化或非模块化系统的正式分析。我们发现，对人工智能（一种预测工具）的依赖会增加决策变异，进而如果组织内的决策相互影响，则会带来挑战。模块化导致任务独立而非系统层面的相互依赖，从而缓和了这种影响。因此，模块化可以促进人工智能的采纳。然而，这是以牺牲协同效应为代价的。相比之下，当存在决策间协调机制时，在非模块化环境下人工智能的采纳会得到增强。因此，我们表明，在重要情况下，当人工智能不仅能在任务层面采纳，而且能作为设计好的组织系统的一部分时，其采纳将得到增强。

28810.title: Were Small–Town New Yorkers Life–Cycle Savers?
28810.zh_title: 小镇纽约人是生命周期储蓄者吗？
28810.abstract: Theories of household saving, including the life cycle hypothesis, posit that households add or draw down wealth to equalize the value of consumption over time. This article examines the extent to which late–nineteenth–century, small–town Americans accumulated financial assets consistent with the life cycle hypothesis. Using individual account records from a small–town savings banks, I find that savers accumulated an average of one year’s income at age sixty. Decumulation was slower than expected after age sixty. The evidence is inconsistent with a strong bequest motive, so the slow drawing down of wealth in old age may have been due to uncertain mortality risk or wealth–based attrition from the sample. I find differences in the life cycle accumulations between men and women, the native– and foreign–born, and low–skill and high–skill workers.
28810.zh_abstract: 家庭储蓄理论，包括生命周期假说，认为家庭通过增加或减少财富来使消费价值随时间均等化。本文考察了19世纪末美国小镇居民积累金融资产的程度是否符合生命周期假说。利用一家小镇储蓄银行的个人账户记录，我发现储蓄者在60岁时平均积累了相当于一年收入的财富。60岁后的减储速度慢于预期。证据不支持强烈的遗赠动机，因此老年时期财富缓慢减少可能是由于不确定的死亡风险或基于财富的样本损耗。我发现了男性和女性、本土出生和外国出生者、低技能和高技能工人之间生命周期积累的差异。

28809.title: Cream Skimming by Health Care Providers and Inequality in Health Care Access: Evidence from a Randomized Field Experiment
28809.zh_title: 医疗服务提供者的“撇脂”行为与医疗可及性不平等：来自随机实地实验的证据
28809.authors: Anna Werbeck, Ansgar Wübker, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
28809.abstract: Using a randomized field experiment, we show that health care specialists cream-skim patients by their expected profitability. In the German two-tier system, outpatient reimbursement rates for both public and private insurance are centrally determined but are significantly higher for the privately insured. In our field experiment, following a standardized protocol, the same hypothetical patient called 991 private practices in 36 German counties to schedule appointments for allergy tests, hearing tests and gastroscopies. Practices were 4% more likely to offer an appointment to the privately insured. Conditional on being offered an appointment, wait times for the publicly insured were twice as long than for the privately insured. We also find smaller access differences when reimbursement rate differences are smaller. Our findings show that structural differences in reimbursement rates lead to structural differences in health care access.
28809.zh_abstract: 通过一项随机实地实验，我们表明医疗专家会根据患者的预期盈利能力进行“撇脂”选择。在德国的两级医疗体系中，公共和私人保险的门诊报销率由中央统一确定，但私人保险的报销率显著更高。在我们的实地实验中，按照标准化协议，同一名模拟患者致电德国36个县的991家私人诊所，预约过敏测试、听力测试和胃镜检查。诊所向私人保险患者提供预约的可能性高出4%。在获得预约的情况下，公共保险患者的等待时间是私人保险患者的两倍。我们还发现，当报销率差异较小时，可及性差异也较小。我们的发现表明，报销率的结构性差异导致了医疗可及性的结构性差异。

28808.title: The Role of Paid Family Leave in Labor Supply Responses to a Spouse’s Disability or Health Shock
28808.zh_title: 带薪家庭假在配偶残疾或健康冲击后劳动力供给反应中的作用
28808.authors: Priyanka Anand, Laura Dague, Kathryn L. Wagner
28808.abstract: The onset of a disability or major health shock can affect the labor supply of not only those experiencing the event but also their family members. Potential caregivers face a tradeoff between time spent earning income for the family and providing care for their spouse, which could be affected by the availability of paid leave. We examine caregiving and labor supply decisions after a spouse’s disability or health shock and the role of paid leave laws implemented in California and New Jersey in the response using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP). We show that labor force participation of potential caregivers decreased after spousal work-limiting disability or chronic health condition and, to a lesser extent, work-limiting illness. We find that paid leave reduces the likelihood that potential caregivers decrease their work hours to provide caregiving to their spouse after a work-limiting disability or chronic health condition, but limited evidence of effects on other employment outcomes. Our findings demonstrate that spousal disability and health shocks have long-run effects on household labor supply and therefore could be mediated by paid leave; we conclude by discussing possible reasons for finding limited impact in this context.
28808.zh_abstract: 残疾或重大健康冲击的发生不仅会影响经历该事件者的劳动力供给，还会影响其家庭成员。潜在照顾者面临在赚取家庭收入和为配偶提供护理之间权衡的时间分配，这可能受到带薪休假可用性的影响。我们利用收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）的数据，考察了配偶残疾或健康冲击后的护理和劳动力供给决策，以及加利福尼亚州和新泽西州实施的带薪休假法律在此反应中的作用。我们表明，在配偶出现工作限制性残疾或慢性健康状况后，潜在照顾者的劳动力参与率下降，在工作限制性疾病后下降程度较小。我们发现，带薪休假降低了潜在照顾者在配偶出现工作限制性残疾或慢性健康状况后减少工作时间以提供护理的可能性，但对其他就业结果的影响证据有限。我们的发现表明，配偶残疾和健康冲击对家庭劳动力供给具有长期影响，因此可能通过带薪休假得到调节；最后，我们讨论了在此背景下发现有限影响可能的原因。

28807.title: Language Barriers in Multinationals and Knowledge Transfers
28807.zh_title: 跨国公司中的语言障碍与知识转移
28807.authors: Louise Guillouet, Amit Khandelwal, Rocco Macchiavello, Madhav Malhotra, Matthieu Teachout
28807.abstract: We study communication frictions within multinationals (MNCs), hypothesizing that language barriers reduce management knowledge transfers within the organization. A distinct feature of such MNCs is a three-tier hierarchy: foreign managers (FMs) supervise domestic managers (DMs) who supervise production workers. Tailored surveys from our setting – MNCs in Myanmar – reveal that language barriers impede interactions between FMs and DMs. A first experimental protocol offers DMs free English courses and confirms that lowering communications costs increases their interactions with FMs. A second experimental protocol that asks human-resource managers at domestic firms to rate hypothetical resumes reveals that multinational experience and, specifically, DM-FM interactions are valued in the domestic labor market. Together, these results suggest that reducing language barriers can improve transfers of management knowledge, an interpretation supported by improvements in soft skills among treatment DMs in the first experiment. A model in which communication within MNCs is non-contractible – a realistic feature of workplace life – reveals that the experimental results are consistent with underinvestment in language training and provide a rationale for policy intervention.
28807.zh_abstract: 我们研究跨国公司内部的沟通摩擦，假设语言障碍会阻碍组织内部管理知识的转移。此类跨国公司的一个显著特征是三层级结构：外籍经理监督本土经理，本土经理再监督生产工人。针对我们的研究背景——缅甸的跨国公司——进行的定制调查显示，语言障碍阻碍了外籍经理与本土经理之间的互动。第一个实验方案为本土经理提供免费英语课程，并证实降低沟通成本会增加他们与外籍经理的互动。第二个实验方案要求本土企业的人力资源经理对假设简历进行评分，结果显示跨国公司经验，特别是本土经理与外籍经理的互动，在国内劳动力市场上受到重视。综合来看，这些结果表明减少语言障碍可以改善管理知识的转移，第一个实验中接受处理的本土经理软技能的提高支持了这一解释。一个假设跨国公司内部沟通不可契约化（这是职场生活的现实特征）的模型揭示，实验结果与语言培训投资不足相一致，并为政策干预提供了理由。

28806.title: Household Debt Overhang Did Hardly Cause a Larger Spending Fall during the Financial Crisis in the UK
28806.zh_title: 英国金融危机期间家庭债务积压几乎未导致支出更大程度下降
28806.abstract: The “debt-overhang hypothesis” – that households cut back more on their spending in a crisis when they have higher levels of outstanding mortgage debt (Dynan, 2012) – seems to be taken for granted by macroprudential authorities in several countries in their policy decisions, as well as by the international organizations that evaluate and comment on countries’ macroprudential policy. Results are presented for UK microdata that reject the debt-overhang hypothesis. The results instead support the “spending-normalization hypothesis” of Andersen, Duus, and Jensen (2016a), what can also be called the “debt-financed overspending” hypothesis – that the correlation between high pre-crisis household indebtedness and subsequent spending cuts during the crisis reflects high debt-financed spending pre-crisis and a return to normal spending during the crisis. As discussed in Svensson (2019, 2020), this is consistent with the correlation reflecting debt-financed overspending through what Muellbauer (2012) calls the “housing-collateral household demand” and Mian and Sufi (2018) the “credit-driven household demand” channel. The correlation is thus spurious and an example of omitted-variable bias. A simple model shows that consumption and debt changes are directly and strongly positively correlated, whereas consumption and debt levels are quite weakly negatively correlated. Importantly, and in contrast, examples show that there is no systematic relation between consumption cuts and levels of or changes in LTV ratios. The lack of a robust relation between consumption cuts and levels of or changes in LTV ratios implies that tests of these hypotheses should generally not be done by regressions of consumption cuts on levels of or changes in LTV ratios.
28806.zh_abstract: “债务积压假说”——即危机期间未偿还抵押贷款债务水平较高的家庭支出削减更多（Dynan, 2012）——似乎被多个国家的宏观审慎当局在政策决策中以及评估和评论各国宏观审慎政策的国际组织视为理所当然。本文基于英国微观数据得出的结果拒绝了债务积压假说。结果反而支持了Andersen、Duus和Jensen（2016a）的“支出正常化假说”，也可称为“债务融资过度支出”假说——即危机前家庭高负债与危机期间随后支出削减之间的相关性，反映了危机前高债务融资支出以及危机期间支出回归正常水平。正如Svensson（2019, 2020）所讨论的，这与相关性反映了通过Muellbauer（2012）所称的“住房抵押家庭需求”渠道以及Mian和Sufi（2018）所称的“信贷驱动家庭需求”渠道进行的债务融资过度支出是一致的。因此，这种相关性是虚假的，是遗漏变量偏差的一个例子。一个简单模型显示，消费和债务变化直接且强烈正相关，而消费和债务水平则相当弱负相关。重要的是，相比之下，例子表明消费削减与贷款价值比水平或变化之间不存在系统性关系。消费削减与贷款价值比水平或变化之间缺乏稳健关系，意味着对这些假说的检验通常不应通过将消费削减对贷款价值比水平或变化进行回归来进行。
28806.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, G01, G18, G21, R21

28805.title: The Business of City Hall
28805.abstract: Compared to the federal government, the average citizen in the U.S. has far greater interaction with city governments, including policing, health services, zoning laws, utilities, schooling, and transportation. At the regional level, it is city governments that provide the infrastructure and services that facilitate agglomeration economies in urban areas. However, there is relatively little empirical evidence on the operations of city governments as economic entities. To overcome deficiencies in traditional datasets, this paper amasses a novel, hand-collected dataset on city government finances to describe the functions, expenses, and revenues of the largest 39 cities in the United States from 2003 to 2018. First, city governments are large, with average revenues equivalent to the 78th percentile of U.S. publicly traded firms. Second, cities collect an increasingly large fraction of revenues through direct user fees, rather than taxes. By 2018, total charges for services equal tax revenue in the median city. Third, controlling for city fixed effects, population, and personal income, large city governments shrunk by 15% between 2009 and 2018. Finally, the growth rate of city expenses is more sensitive to population growth, while the growth rate of city revenues is more sensitive to income. These sensitivities lead smaller, poorer cities' expenses to grow faster than their revenues.
28805.zh_abstract: 与联邦政府相比，美国普通公民与城市政府的互动要多得多，包括警务、卫生服务、分区法规、公用事业、教育和交通。在区域层面，正是城市政府提供了基础设施和服务，促进了城市地区的集聚经济。然而，关于城市政府作为经济实体的运作，实证证据相对较少。为弥补传统数据集的不足，本文收集了一个新颖的手工整理的城市政府财政数据集，以描述2003年至2018年美国39个最大城市的职能、支出和收入。首先，城市政府规模庞大，平均收入相当于美国上市公司收入分布的第78百分位。其次，城市通过直接用户费而非税收获得的收入比例越来越大。到2018年，在中等城市，服务收费总额等于税收收入。第三，在控制城市固定效应、人口和个人收入后，大城市政府在2009年至2018年间规模缩小了15%。最后，城市支出增长率对人口增长更敏感，而城市收入增长率对收入增长更敏感。这些敏感性导致较小、较贫困城市的支出增长快于其收入增长。

28804.title: The Limits of Reopening Policy to Alter Economic Behavior: New Evidence from Texas
28804.zh_title: 重新开放政策改变经济行为的局限性：来自德克萨斯州的新证据
28804.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Joseph J. Sabia, Samuel Safford
28804.abstract: In the midst of mass COVID-19 vaccination distribution efforts in the U.S., Texas became the first state to abolish its mask mandate and fully lift capacity constraints for all businesses, effective on March 10, 2021. Proponents claimed that the reopening would generate short-run employment growth and signal a return to normal while opponents argued that it would cause a resurgence of COVID-19 and kill Texans. This study finds that each side was largely incorrect. First, using daily anonymized smartphone data — and synthetic control and difference-in-differences approaches — we find no evidence that the Texas reopening led to substantial changes in mobility, including foot traffic at a wide set of business establishments. Second, we find no evidence that the Texas reopening affected the rate of new COVID-19 cases or deaths during the five weeks following the reopening. Our null results persist across more urbanized and less urbanized counties, as well as across counties that supported Donald Trump and Joe Biden in the 2020 presidential election. Finally, we find no evidence that the Texas reopening impacted short-run employment, including in industries most affected by the reopening. Together, these findings underscore the persistence of late-pandemic era private behavior and stickiness in individuals’ risk-related beliefs, and suggest that reopening policies may have impacts that are more muted than policymakers expect.
28804.zh_abstract: 在美国大规模推广新冠疫苗接种的过程中，德克萨斯州成为第一个废除口罩令并全面解除所有企业容量限制的州，该政策于2021年3月10日生效。支持者声称重新开放将在短期内促进就业增长，并标志着回归正常生活，而反对者则认为这将导致新冠疫情卷土重来并危及德克萨斯州居民的生命。本研究发现双方的观点在很大程度上都是错误的。首先，利用每日匿名智能手机数据，并结合合成控制法和双重差分法，我们没有发现任何证据表明德克萨斯州的重新开放导致了人员流动性的显著变化，包括各类商业场所的客流量。其次，我们没有发现任何证据表明德克萨斯州的重新开放影响了重新开放后五周内的新增新冠病例或死亡人数。我们的零结果在城市化程度较高和较低的县，以及在2020年总统大选中支持唐纳德·特朗普和乔·拜登的县中均保持一致。最后，我们没有发现任何证据表明德克萨斯州的重新开放影响了短期就业，包括受重新开放影响最大的行业。这些发现共同强调了疫情后期私人行为的持续性以及个人风险相关信念的粘性，并表明重新开放政策可能产生比政策制定者预期更微弱的影响。
28804.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I18

28803.title: Experiences and Coping Strategies of College Students During the COVID-19 Pandemic
28803.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间大学生的经历与应对策略
28803.authors: Christine Logel, Philip Oreopoulos, Uros Petronijevic
28803.abstract: An emerging literature documents the many challenges faced by college students during the COVID-19 pandemic. Little is known, however, about how students responded to the adversity. Focusing on two large Canadian universities, we provide some of the first evidence on the coping strategies students reported and the relationships between their endorsement of specific coping strategies and their subsequent well-being. Students focused on compensating for a lack of structure by creating new routines, maintaining social connections, and trying new activities. Conditional on baseline problems indexes, students who initially endorsed social connectedness as a strategy score significantly higher on a comprehensive well-being index five to twelve weeks later.
28803.zh_abstract: 新兴文献记录了新冠疫情期间大学生面临的诸多挑战。然而，关于学生如何应对这些逆境，我们知之甚少。聚焦于两所大型加拿大大学，我们提供了一些关于学生报告的应对策略，以及他们对特定策略的认可与后续幸福感之间关系的初步证据。学生们专注于通过创造新的日常规律、维持社交联系和尝试新活动来弥补缺乏结构性的问题。在控制了基线问题指数后，那些最初将社交联系作为一种策略的学生，在五到十二周后的综合幸福感指数上得分显著更高。

28802.title: Cyclical Worker Flows: Cleansing vs. Sullying
28802.zh_title: 周期性劳动力流动：净化效应与污染效应
28802.authors: John C. Haltiwanger, Henry R. Hyatt, Erika McEntarfer, Matthew Staiger
28802.abstract: Do recessions speed up or impede productivity-enhancing reallocation? To investigate this question, we use U.S. linked employer-employee data to examine how worker flows contribute to productivity growth over the business cycle. We find that in expansions high-productivity firms grow faster primarily by hiring workers away from lower-productivity firms. The rate at which job-to-job flows move workers up the productivity ladder is highly procyclical. Productivity growth slows during recessions when this job ladder collapses. In contrast, flows into nonemployment from low productivity firms disproportionately increase in recessions, which leads to an increase in productivity growth. We thus find evidence of both sullying and cleansing effects of recessions, but the timing of these effects differs. The cleansing effect dominates early in downturns but the sullying effect lingers well into the economic recovery.
28802.zh_abstract: 经济衰退是加速还是阻碍了提升生产率的资源重新配置？为了研究这个问题，我们利用美国关联雇主-雇员数据，考察了劳动力流动如何在整个商业周期内促进生产率增长。我们发现，在经济扩张期，高生产率企业主要通过从低生产率企业挖角员工来实现更快的增长。工作间流动沿着生产率阶梯向上移动的比率是高度顺周期的。当这个工作阶梯在经济衰退期间崩溃时，生产率增长会放缓。相比之下，从低生产率企业流向非就业状态的劳动力在经济衰退期间不成比例地增加，这导致了生产率增长。因此，我们发现了经济衰退同时存在污染效应和净化效应的证据，但这些效应的时间点不同。净化效应在衰退初期占主导地位，而污染效应则持续到经济复苏之后。
28802.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, E32, J24, J63, J64

28801.title: Simplifying Bias Correction for Selective Sampling: A Unified Distribution-Free Approach to Handling Endogenously Selected Samples
28801.zh_title: 简化选择性抽样的偏差校正：一种处理内生选择样本的统一无分布方法
28801.abstract: Unlike random sampling, selective sampling draws units based on the outcome values, such as over-sampling rare events in choice outcomes and extreme activities on continuous and count outcomes. Despite high cost effectiveness for marketing research, such endogenously selected samples must be carefully analyzed to avoid selection bias. We introduce a unified and efficient approach based on semiparametric odds ratio (SOR) models applicable for categorical, continuous and count response data collected using selective sampling. Unlike extant sampling-adjusting methods and Heckman-type selection models, the proposed approach requires neither modeling selection mechanisms nor imposing parametric distributional assumptions on the response variables, eliminating both sources of mis-specification bias. Using this approach, one can quantify and test for the relationships among variables as if samples had been collected via random sampling, simplifying bias correction of endogenously selected samples. We evaluate and illustrate the method using extensive simulation studies and two real data examples: endogenously stratified sampling for linear/nonlinear regressions to identify drivers of the share-of-wallet outcome for cigarettes smokers, and using truncated and on-site samples for count data models of store shopping demand. The evaluation shows that selective sampling followed by applying the SOR approach reduces required sample size by more than 70% compared with random sampling, and that in a wide range of selective sampling scenarios SOR offers novel solutions outperforming extant methods for selective samples with opportunities to make better managerial decisions.
28801.zh_abstract: 与随机抽样不同，选择性抽样根据结果值抽取样本，例如在分类结果中过度抽样罕见事件，以及在连续和计数结果中过度抽样极端活动。尽管对于市场研究而言成本效益很高，但必须仔细分析此类内生选择样本以避免选择偏差。我们引入了一种基于半参数比值比模型的统一且高效的方法，适用于使用选择性抽样收集的分类、连续和计数响应数据。与现有的抽样调整方法和赫克曼型选择模型不同，所提出的方法既不需要对选择机制进行建模，也不需要对响应变量施加参数分布假设，从而消除了这两种错误设定的偏差来源。使用这种方法，人们可以量化和检验变量之间的关系，就好像样本是通过随机抽样收集的一样，从而简化了内生选择样本的偏差校正。我们通过广泛的模拟研究和两个真实数据示例来评估和说明该方法：用于识别吸烟者钱包份额结果驱动因素的线性/非线性回归的内生分层抽样，以及使用截断样本和现场样本对商店购物需求进行计数数据建模。评估表明，与随机抽样相比，采用选择性抽样后应用半参数比值比方法可将所需样本量减少70%以上，并且在广泛的选择性抽样场景中，半参数比值比方法提供了新颖的解决方案，优于现有的选择性样本方法，为做出更好的管理决策提供了机会。

28800.title: From Man vs. Machine to Man + Machine: The Art and AI of Stock Analyses
28800.zh_title: 从人机对抗到人机协作：股票分析的艺术与人工智能
28800.authors: Sean Cao, Wei Jiang, Junbo L. Wang, Baozhong Yang
28800.abstract: An AI analyst we build to digest corporate financial information, qualitative disclosure and macroeconomic indicators is able to beat the majority of human analysts in stock price forecasts and generate excess returns compared to following human analyst. In the contest of “man vs machine,” the relative advantage of the AI Analyst is stronger when the firm is complex, and when information is high-dimensional, transparent and voluminous. Human analysts remain competitive when critical information requires institutional knowledge (such as the nature of intangible assets). The edge of the AI over human analysts declines over time when analysts gain access to alternative data and to in-house AI resources. Combining AI’s computational power and the human art of understanding soft information produces the highest potential in generating accurate forecasts. Our paper portraits a future of “machine plus human” (instead of human displacement) in high-skill professions.
28800.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个人工智能分析师，用于消化公司财务信息、定性披露和宏观经济指标，它在股价预测方面能够击败大多数人类分析师，并且与跟随人类分析师相比能产生超额收益。在“人机对抗”中，当公司复杂、信息高维、透明且量大时，人工智能分析师的相对优势更强。当关键信息需要制度知识时，人类分析师仍具有竞争力。随着时间的推移，当分析师能够获得替代数据和内部人工智能资源时，人工智能相对于人类分析师的优势会下降。将人工智能的计算能力与人类理解软信息的艺术相结合，在产生准确预测方面具有最大潜力。我们的论文描绘了高技能职业中“机器加人类”的未来。
28800.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G11, G12, G14, G31, M41

28848.title: Opioid Use, Health and Crime: Insights from a Rapid Reduction in Heroin Supply
28848.zh_title: 阿片类药物使用、健康与犯罪：来自海洛因供应急剧减少的启示
28848.authors: Timothy J. Moore, Kevin T. Schnepel
28848.abstract: In 2001, a large and sustained supply shock halted a heroin epidemic in Australia. We use drug offenses to identify individual opioid users and examine how the shock affected their mortality risks and criminal activity over the next eight years. Initially, gains from fewer overdoses are offset by drug substitution and more crime, including homicides. Most adverse effects dissipate over time, while persistent mortality reductions save the lives of around one in 48 individuals in our sample. Our results demonstrate that reducing the supply of illicit opioids can lead to meaningful longer-term improvements, even when the short-term effects are ambiguous.
28848.zh_abstract: 2001年，一次大规模且持续的供应冲击遏制了澳大利亚的海洛因流行。我们利用毒品犯罪来识别个体阿片类药物使用者，并考察该冲击如何影响他们在接下来八年中的死亡风险和犯罪活动。最初，因过量服用减少带来的收益被药物替代和更多犯罪（包括凶杀）所抵消。大多数不利影响随时间消散，而持续的死亡率降低挽救了我们样本中大约每48人中有1人的生命。我们的结果表明，减少非法阿片类药物的供应可以带来有意义的长期改善，即使短期效果尚不明确。

28847.title: Agglomeration Economies and Race Specific Spillovers
28847.zh_title: 集聚经济与种族特定溢出效应
28847.authors: Elizabeth Ananat, Shihe Fu, Stephen Ross
28847.abstract: Racial social isolation within and across workplaces may reduce firm productivity. We provide descriptive evidence that African-Americans feel socially isolated from Whites. To test whether isolation affects productivity, we estimate models of Total Factor Productivity for manufacturing firms allowing returns to local area concentrations of economic activity and human capital spillovers to vary with the racial and ethnic composition of both the establishment and the local area employment. Higher own-race exposure for establishment workers to workers at surrounding establishments strengthens the relationship between productivity and both employment density and concentrations of college educated workers. Effects for human capital spillovers are largest for firms with more patents and more research and development spending. Looming demographic changes suggest that this drag on productivity may increase over time.
28847.zh_abstract: 工作场所内部及跨工作场所的种族社会隔离可能降低企业生产率。我们提供了非裔美国人在白人群体中感到社会隔离的描述性证据。为了检验隔离是否影响生产率，我们估计了制造业企业的全要素生产率模型，允许经济活动本地集中度的回报和人力资本溢出效应随企业及本地就业的种族和民族构成而变化。企业员工与周边企业员工更高的同种族接触率，增强了生产率与就业密度及大学教育程度工人集中度之间的关系。人力资本溢出效应对于拥有更多专利和更多研发支出的企业影响最大。即将到来的人口结构变化表明，这种对生产率的拖累可能会随时间加剧。
28847.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：J15, J24, L11, R12, R23, R32

28846.title: More than an Ivory Tower: The Impact of Research Institutions on the Quantity and Quality of Entrepreneurship
28846.zh_title: 不仅仅是象牙塔：研究机构对创业数量和质量的影响
28846.abstract: This paper provides systematic empirical evidence for the distinctive role of universities on local entrepreneurial ecosystems. Assessing the impact of research institutions on entrepreneurship is challenging, given that these institutions are often located in economic and innovation environments conducive to growth-oriented entrepreneurial activity, are themselves a source of local demand, and produce knowledge, which might serve as the foundation for new ventures. To overcome this inference challenge, we first combine comprehensive business registration records with a predictive analytics approach to measure both the quantity and quality-adjusted quantity of entrepreneurship at the zip-code level on an annual basis. We then link each location to the presence or absence of research-oriented universities or national laboratories. Finally, we exploit significant changes over time in Federal commitments to both universities and national laboratories. Our key finding is that changes in Federal research commitments to universities are uniquely linked to positively correlated changes in the quality-adjusted quantity of entrepreneurship. In contrast, increases in non-research funding to universities and funding to national laboratories is associated with either a neutral or negative impact on the quality-adjusted quantity of entrepreneurship. Research funding to universities seems to play a unique role in promoting the acceleration of local entrepreneurial ecosystems.
28846.zh_abstract: 本文为大学在本地创业生态系统中的独特作用提供了系统的经验证据。评估研究机构对创业的影响具有挑战性，因为这些机构通常位于有利于增长导向型创业活动的经济和创新环境中，它们本身是本地需求的来源，并产生可能成为新企业基础的知识。为了克服这一推断挑战，我们首先将全面的商业注册记录与预测分析方法相结合，以年度为基础衡量邮政编码层面的创业数量和质量调整后的数量。然后，我们将每个地点与研究型大学或国家实验室的存在与否联系起来。最后，我们利用联邦对大学和国家实验室承诺的随时间显著变化。我们的关键发现是，联邦对大学研究承诺的变化与质量调整后创业数量的正相关变化独特地联系在一起。相比之下，对大学非研究经费的增加以及对国家实验室经费的增加，与质量调整后创业数量的中性或负面影响相关。对大学的研究经费似乎在促进本地创业生态系统加速方面发挥着独特作用。

28845.title: Making Entrepreneurs: Returns to Training Youth in Hard Versus Soft Business Skills
28845.zh_title: 培养创业者：对青年进行硬技能与软技能商业培训的回报
28845.authors: Laura Chioda, David Contreras-Loya, Paul Gertler, Dana Carney
28845.abstract: We study the medium-term impacts of the Skills for Effective Entrepreneurship Development (SEED) program, an innovative in-residence 3-week mini-MBA program for high school students modeled after western business school curricula and adapted to the Ugandan context. The program featured two separate treatments: the hard-skills MBA features a mix of approximately 75% hard skills and 25% soft skills; the soft skills curriculum has the reverse mix. Using data on 4400 youth from a nationally representative sample in a 3-arm field experiment in Uganda, the 3.5 year follow-up demonstrated that training was effective in improving both hard and soft skills, but only soft skills were directly linked to improvements in self-efficacy, persuasion, and negotiation. The skill upgrade was rewarded in substantially higher earnings; 32.1% and 29.8% increases in earnings for those who attended hard- and soft-training, respectively, most of which, was generated through self-mployment. Furthermore, youth in both groups were more likely to start enterprises and more successful in ensuring their businesses' survival. The program led to significantly larger profits (24.2% and 27.2% for hard- and soft- treatment arms respectively) and larger business capital investments (38.4% and 32.6% for SEED hard and SEED soft, respectively). Both SEED curricula were very cost-effective; two months worth of the extra earnings caused by the training alone would exceed the cost of the program. These benefits abstract from the job- and business-creation benefits of the program, which were substantial: relative to the control group, SEED entrepreneurs created 985 additional jobs and 550 new businesses.
28845.zh_abstract: 我们研究了有效创业发展技能项目的长期影响，这是一个创新的、为期三周的住宿式迷你MBA项目，面向高中生，模仿西方商学院课程并根据乌干达国情进行调整。该项目设有两个独立的处理组：硬技能MBA课程大约包含75%的硬技能和25%的软技能；软技能课程则相反。利用来自乌干达全国代表性样本中4400名青年的数据，在为期三年半的跟踪调查中，我们发现培训有效地提高了硬技能和软技能，但只有软技能与自我效能感、说服力和谈判能力的提升直接相关。技能提升带来了显著更高的收入；参加硬技能和软技能培训的人收入分别增长了32.1%和29.8%，其中大部分来自自雇就业。此外，两个组的青年都更有可能创办企业，并且在确保企业生存方面更为成功。该项目带来了显著更高的利润（硬技能和软技能处理组分别增长24.2%和27.2%）和更大的商业资本投资（硬技能和软技能处理组分别增长38.4%和32.6%）。两个课程都非常具有成本效益；仅由培训带来的额外收入中两个月的收入就超过了项目成本。这些收益还不包括项目带来的就业和创业创造效益，这些效益相当可观：与对照组相比，项目创业者创造了985个额外就业岗位和550家新企业。
28845.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PR；JEL：J24, L26, O1

28844.title: Learning in the Household
28844.authors: John J. Conlon, Malavika Mani, Gautam Rao, Matthew W. Ridley, Frank Schilbach
28844.abstract: We study social learning between spouses using an experiment in Chennai, India. We vary whether individuals discover information themselves or must instead learn what their spouse discovered via a discussion. Women treat their 'own' and their husband's information the same. In sharp contrast, men's beliefs respond less than half as much to information that was discovered by their wife. This is not due to a lack of communication: husbands put less weight on their wife's signals even when perfectly informed of them. In a second experiment, when paired with mixed- and same-gender strangers, both men and women heavily discount their teammate's information relative to their own. We conclude that people have a tendency to underweight others' information relative to their own. The marital context creates a countervailing force for women, resulting in a gender difference in learning (only) in the household.
28844.zh_abstract: 我们通过印度金奈的一项实验研究了配偶之间的社会学习。我们改变了信息发现的方式：是个人自己发现信息，还是必须通过讨论了解配偶发现的信息。女性对待“自己的”信息和丈夫的信息方式相同。与此形成鲜明对比的是，男性对妻子发现的信息的反应程度不到其自身信息的一半。这并非由于缺乏沟通：即使丈夫完全知晓妻子的信号，他们也会对其赋予较低的权重。在第二个实验中，当与混合性别和同性别的陌生人配对时，男性和女性都严重低估队友的信息相对于自己信息的价值。我们得出结论，人们倾向于低估他人信息相对于自己信息的价值。婚姻背景为女性创造了一种反作用力，导致（仅在）家庭内部出现学习方面的性别差异。

28843.title: How Resilient Is Mortgage Credit Supply? Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
28843.zh_title: 抵押贷款信贷供给的韧性有多强？来自COVID-19大流行的证据
28843.authors: Andreas Fuster, Aurel Hizmo, Lauren Lambie-Hanson, James Vickery, Paul S. Willen
28843.abstract: We study the resilience of US mortgage credit supply during the COVID-19 pandemic—the most significant shock since the financial crisis—and draw out broader lessons about the functioning of this important market. While mortgage lending boomed in 2020-21, we find that a sharp increase in intermediation markups limited the passthrough of low rates to households. We link this increase in markups to capacity constraints amplified by pandemic-related operational and labor market frictions. We also present new evidence that capacity constraints in the mortgage market are national in scope and have not yet been significantly mitigated by recent technological change. Nonbank lenders, often thought to be fragile, gained market share from banks but remain reliant on securitization. We also find evidence that government credit guarantees support the flow of credit to risky borrowers but are not always sufficient, and that quantitative easing boosts supply particularly for the types of loans being purchased.
28843.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国抵押贷款信贷供给在COVID-19大流行期间的韧性——这是自金融危机以来最重大的冲击——并从中提炼出关于这一重要市场运作的更广泛教训。尽管2020-21年抵押贷款发放量激增，但我们发现，中介加价的大幅增加限制了低利率向家庭的传导。我们将这种加价增加与产能限制联系起来，而疫情相关的运营和劳动力市场摩擦加剧了这些限制。我们还提出了新的证据，表明抵押贷款市场的产能限制是全国性的，并且尚未被近期的技术变革显著缓解。非银行放贷机构（通常被认为脆弱）从银行手中夺取了市场份额，但仍然依赖证券化。我们还发现，政府信贷担保支持了向高风险借款人的信贷流动，但并不总是足够的；量化宽松尤其增加了对所购买贷款类型的供给。
28843.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：G21, G23, G28

28842.title: Sorting Out the Real Effects of Credit Supply
28842.zh_title: 厘清信贷供给的真实效应
28842.authors: Briana Chang, Matthieu Gomez, Harrison Hong
28842.abstract: We document that banks which cut lending more during the Great Recession were lending to riskier firms. To explain this evidence, we build a competitive matching model of bank-firm relationships in which risky firms borrow from banks with low holding costs. Based on default probabilities and equilibrium loan rates, we use our sorting model to recover the latent bank holding cost distribution. The measure of banks with low holding costs dropped during the Great Recession. This credit supply shift conservatively accounted for around 50% of the decline in corporate loans over this period. Our attribution cannot be captured by panel regression estimates from the bank lending channel literature.
28842.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在大衰退期间削减贷款更多的银行，其贷款对象是风险更高的企业。为了解释这一证据，我们构建了一个银行-企业关系的竞争性匹配模型，其中风险企业从持有成本较低的银行借款。基于违约概率和均衡贷款利率，我们利用排序模型来恢复潜在的银行持有成本分布。在大衰退期间，低持有成本银行的数量下降了。保守估计，这一信贷供给的转变解释了该时期企业贷款下降的约50%。我们的归因无法被银行贷款渠道文献中的面板回归估计所捕捉。

28841.title: Suburbanization in the United States 1970-2010
28841.abstract: The second half of the twentieth century saw large-scale suburbanization in the United States, with the median share of residents who work in the same county where they live falling from 87 to 71 percent between 1970 and 2000. We introduce a new methodology for discriminating between the three leading explanations for this suburbanization (workplace attractiveness, residence attractiveness and bilateral commuting frictions). This methodology holds in the class of spatial models that are characterized by a structural gravity equation for commuting. We show that the increased openness of counties to commuting is mainly explained by reductions in bilateral commuting frictions, consistent with the expansion of the interstate highway network and the falling real cost of car ownership. We find that changes in workplace attractiveness and residence attractiveness are more important in explaining the observed shift in employment by workplace and employment by residence towards lower densities over time.
28841.zh_abstract: 二十世纪下半叶，美国经历了大规模的郊区化，在1970年至2000年间，居住地与工作地在同一县的居民比例中位数从87%下降到71%。我们引入了一种新方法来区分郊区化的三种主要解释（工作地吸引力、居住地吸引力和双边通勤摩擦）。该方法适用于以结构性通勤引力方程为特征的空间模型类别。我们发现，各县通勤开放度的提高主要归因于双边通勤摩擦的减少，这与州际公路网络的扩张和汽车拥有实际成本的下降相一致。我们发现，工作地吸引力和居住地吸引力的变化在解释观察到的按工作地就业和按居住地就业随时间向低密度地区转移方面更为重要。

28840.title: Research and Market Structure: Evidence from an Antibiotic-Resistant Pathogenic Outbreak
28840.zh_title: 研究与市场结构：来自抗生素耐药性病原体爆发的证据
28840.authors: Mayank Aggarwal, Anindya Chakrabarti, Chirantan Chatterjee, Matthew J. Higgins
28840.abstract: Do upstream research shocks impact unconnected downstream product markets? We explore this question using a natural experiment involving a publication that identified a pathogenic outbreak in India involving a carbapenem antibiotic resistant superbug. Consistent with theory, we find that this upstream research shock caused multinational firms selling carbapenem antibiotics in India to reduce their downstream market exposure. Rational antibiotic stewardship implies that we should observe a similar response by domestic Indian firms. Surprisingly, we observe the opposite; domestic Indian firms filled the void in the market left by multinational firms. We confirm this aggregate finding with prescription level data, Indian physicians prescribed fewer focal multinational products relative to domestic firm products. Results are robust to alternate control groups and placebo testing. Implications for antibiotic resistance, global health policy and innovation policy are discussed.
28840.zh_abstract: 上游研究冲击是否会影响不相关的下游产品市场？我们利用一个自然实验来探讨这个问题，该实验涉及一篇识别印度碳青霉烯类抗生素耐药超级细菌病原体爆发的出版物。与理论一致，我们发现这一上游研究冲击导致在印度销售碳青霉烯类抗生素的跨国公司减少了其下游市场敞口。合理的抗生素管理意味着印度本土企业也应做出类似反应。令人惊讶的是，我们观察到相反的情况；印度本土企业填补了跨国公司留下的市场空白。我们通过处方层面的数据证实了这一总体发现，印度医生开具的跨国公司重点产品处方相对于本土企业产品有所减少。结果在替代对照组和安慰剂检验中依然稳健。本文讨论了对抗生素耐药性、全球卫生政策和创新政策的启示。

28839.title: Redesigning the Longitudinal Business Database
28839.zh_title: 重新设计纵向商业数据库
28839.authors: Melissa C. Chow, Teresa C. Fort, Christopher Goetz, Nathan Goldschlag, James Lawrence, Elisabeth Ruth Perlman, Martha Stinson, T. Kirk White
28839.abstract: In this paper we describe the U.S. Census Bureau's redesign and production implementation of the Longitudinal Business Database (LBD) first introduced by Jarmin and Miranda (2002). The LBD is used to create the Business Dynamics Statistics (BDS), tabulations describing the entry, exit, expansion, and contraction of businesses. The new LBD and BDS also incorporate information formerly provided by the Statistics of U.S. Businesses program, which produced similar year-to-year measures of employment and establishment flows. We describe in detail how the LBD is created from curation of the input administrative data, longitudinal matching, retiming of economic census-year births and deaths, creation of vintage consistent industry codes and noise factors, and the creation and cleaning of each year of LBD data. This documentation is intended to facilitate the proper use and understanding of the data by both researchers with approved projects accessing the LBD microdata and those using the BDS tabulations.
28839.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们描述了美国人口普查局对Jarmin和Miranda（2002）首次引入的纵向商业数据库（LBD）的重新设计和生产实施。LBD用于创建商业动态统计（BDS），即描述企业进入、退出、扩张和收缩的表格。新的LBD和BDS还整合了原美国商业统计项目提供的信息，该项目产生了类似的年度就业和机构流动指标。我们详细描述了LBD是如何从输入行政数据的整理、纵向匹配、经济普查年出生和死亡的重新定时、创建年份一致的行业代码和噪声因子，以及每年LBD数据的创建和清理中生成的。本文档旨在帮助拥有批准项目访问LBD微观数据的研究人员以及使用BDS表格的用户正确使用和理解这些数据。
28839.meta: Programs：IFM, IO, ITI, LS, PE, PR, TWP；JEL：D0, E0, F0, J0, L0

28838.title: Efficiency and Incidence of Taxation with Free Entry and Love-of-Variety Preferences
28838.zh_title: 自由进入与品种偏好下的税收效率与归宿
28838.authors: Kory Kroft, Jean-William P. Laliberté, René Leal Vizcaíno, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
28838.abstract: This paper develops a theory of commodity taxation with love-of-variety preferences and endogenous firm entry and exit. We consider a framework that encompasses a wide range of firm conduct and derive formulas for efficiency and pass-through of specific and ad valorem taxes. These formulas unify existing canonical ones in the literature and lead to novel economic insights for both welfare and incidence. We use them to derive a desirability condition for when ad valorem taxation is more efficient than specific taxation and a condition for when ad valorem taxation leads to greater pass-through than specific taxation. Finally, we consider an empirical application that illustrates how to estimate the key parameters of the tax formulas in a theoretically consistent way. Our results indicate that specific taxes are more efficient at the margin than ad valorem taxes and that product variety is below the socially optimal level.
28838.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一种具有品种偏好和企业内生进入退出的商品税理论。我们考虑了一个涵盖广泛企业行为的框架，并推导了从量税和从价税的效率和转嫁公式。这些公式统一了文献中现有的经典公式，并为福利和归宿带来了新的经济见解。我们利用这些公式推导了从价税比从量税更有效的合意性条件，以及从价税比从量税导致更大转嫁的条件。最后，我们考虑了一个实证应用，说明了如何以理论一致的方式估计税收公式的关键参数。我们的结果表明，从量税在边际上比从价税更有效，并且产品品种低于社会最优水平。

28837.title: The Conglomerate Network
28837.authors: Kenneth R. Ahern, Lei Kong, Xinyan Yan
28837.abstract: This paper proposes a network model of the economy in which conglomerate firms transmit idiosyncratic shocks from one industry to another. The strength of inter-industry connections is determined by the conglomerate's share of total industry sales and by the industry's share of the conglomerate's total sales. The empirical results show that industry growth rates comove more strongly within industry pairs that are more closely connected in the conglomerate network. These results hold after controlling for industry-pair and year fixed effects, input-output connections, reverse causality, and in tests that exploit exogenous cross-sectional industry shocks from import tariff changes. Finally, our model also provides a new cross-industry extension for the widely-used Herfindahl index of concentration.
28837.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个经济体的网络模型，其中企业集团将特定冲击从一个行业传导到另一个行业。行业间联系的强度由企业集团在该行业总销售额中的份额以及该行业在企业集团总销售额中的份额决定。实证结果表明，在企业集团网络中联系更紧密的行业对之间，行业增长率的相关性更强。这些结果在控制了行业对和年份固定效应、投入产出联系、反向因果关系，以及利用进口关税变化带来的外生横截面行业冲击的检验中依然成立。最后，我们的模型还为广泛使用的赫芬达尔集中度指数提供了一个新的跨行业扩展。

28836.title: The Inflation Expectations of U.S. Firms: Evidence from a new survey
28836.zh_title: 美国企业的通胀预期：来自一项新调查的证据
28836.authors: Bernardo Candia, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
28836.abstract: Introducing a new survey of U.S. firms’ inflation expectations, we document key stylized facts involving what U.S. firms know and expect about inflation and monetary policy. The resulting time series of firms’ inflation expectations displays unique dynamics, distinct from those of households and professional forecasters. By any typical definition of “anchored” expectations, the inflation expectations of U.S. managers appear far from anchored, much like those of households. And like households, U.S. managers are largely uninformed about recent aggregate inflation dynamics or monetary policy. These results complement existing evidence on firms’ inflation expectations from other countries and confirm that inattention to inflation and monetary policy is pervasive among U.S. firms as well.
28836.zh_abstract: 通过引入一项关于美国企业通胀预期的新调查，我们记录了美国企业关于通胀和货币政策所知与所期的关键典型事实。由此产生的企业通胀预期时间序列呈现出独特的动态特征，与家庭和专业预测者的预期截然不同。按照任何典型的“锚定”预期定义，美国管理者的通胀预期似乎远未锚定，与家庭的情况非常相似。而且，与家庭一样，美国管理者对近期总体通胀动态或货币政策基本不了解。这些结果补充了来自其他国家的关于企业通胀预期的现有证据，并证实了美国企业对通胀和货币政策的忽视同样普遍存在。

28835.title: Distributional Impacts of Retail Vaccine Availability
28835.zh_title: 零售疫苗可及性的分配效应
28835.authors: Judith A. Chevalier, Jason L. Schwartz, Yihua Su, Kevin R. Williams
28835.abstract: As countries transition from facing COVID-19 vaccine supply shortfalls to requiring novel strategies to facilitate vaccination, modern retail chains—often designed and located to target particular demographic groups—are a potential vaccine delivery vehicle. Using geospatial data, we quantify the proximity to vaccines created by a U.S. federal program that distributes vaccines to commercial retail pharmacies. We then quantify the impact of a proposal to provide vaccines at Dollar General, a low-priced general merchandise retailer. We show that adding Dollar General to the federal program would substantially decrease the distance to vaccine sites for low-income and minority U.S. households.
28835.zh_abstract: 随着各国从面临COVID-19疫苗供应短缺转向需要创新策略来促进疫苗接种，现代零售连锁店——通常针对特定人口群体进行设计和选址——成为潜在的疫苗分发载体。利用地理空间数据，我们量化了美国一项向商业零售药店分发疫苗的联邦计划所带来的疫苗可及性。然后，我们量化了一项提议的影响，该提议旨在通过Dollar General（一家低价日用商品零售商）提供疫苗。我们表明，将Dollar General纳入联邦计划将显著缩短低收入和少数族裔美国家庭到疫苗接种点的距离。

28834.title: Heterogeneous Global Booms and Busts
28834.zh_title: 异质性的全球繁荣与萧条
28834.abstract: We investigate the heterogeneous boom and bust patterns across countries that emerge as a result of global shocks. Our analysis sheds light on the emergence of core and periphery countries, and the joint determination of the depth of recessions and tightness of credit markets across countries. The model implies that interest rates are similar across core and periphery countries in booms, with larger credit and output growth in periphery countries. However, a common global shock that leads to a credit crunch across the globe gives rise to a sharper spike in interest rates and a deeper recession in periphery countries, while a credit flight to the core alleviates the adverse consequences in these countries. We explore the implication of the model about credit spreads, portfolio rebalancing, investment, non-performing debt and concentration of debt ownership during booms and busts, both in the time series and in the cross-section, and connect them to existing stylized facts. We further demonstrate how the anatomy of the global economy evolves as a result of aggregate demand and supply shocks to financing, such as a global saving glut.
28834.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由全球冲击引发的各国之间异质性的繁荣与萧条模式。我们的分析揭示了核心国家和外围国家的出现，以及各国衰退深度和信贷市场紧缩程度的共同决定。该模型表明，在繁荣时期，核心国家和外围国家的利率相似，但外围国家的信贷和产出增长更大。然而，一场导致全球信贷紧缩的普遍全球冲击，会引发外围国家利率更急剧的飙升和更深的衰退，而信贷逃向核心国家则减轻了这些国家的不利后果。我们探讨了该模型关于信贷利差、投资组合再平衡、投资、不良债务以及繁荣与萧条时期债务所有权集中度的含义，既涉及时间序列也涉及横截面，并将其与现有的典型事实联系起来。我们进一步论证了全球经济的结构如何因融资方面的总需求和总供给冲击（例如全球储蓄过剩）而演变。

28833.title: The Dynamics and Spillovers of Management Interventions: Evidence from the Training Within Industry Program
28833.zh_title: 管理干预的动态与溢出效应：来自行业内部培训计划的证据
28833.abstract: This paper examines the long-term and spillover effects of management interventions on firm performance. Under the Training Within Industry (TWI) program, the U.S. government provided management training to firms involved in war production between 1940 and 1945. Using a newly collected panel dataset on all 11,575 U.S. firms that applied to the program, we find that the TWI training had positive and long-lasting effects on firm performance and the adoption of beneficial managerial practices. Moreover, it generated complementarities among different types of training and had positive spillover effects on the supply chain of trained firms.
28833.zh_abstract: 本文研究了管理干预对企业绩效的长期和溢出效应。根据行业内部培训计划，美国政府于1940年至1945年间为参与战时生产的企业提供了管理培训。利用新收集的、涵盖所有申请该计划的11,575家美国企业的面板数据集，我们发现行业内部培训对企业绩效和有益管理实践的采用产生了积极且持久的影响。此外，它还在不同类型的培训之间产生了互补性，并对受训企业的供应链产生了正向溢出效应。
28833.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PR；JEL：J24, L2, M2, M5, N34, N64, O15, O32, O33

28832.title: Culture, Institutions and Social Equilibria: A Framework
28832.zh_title: 文化、制度与社会均衡：一个框架
28832.abstract: This paper proposes a new framework for studying the interplay between culture and institutions. We interpret culture as a repertoire, consisting of (cultural) attributes and allowing rich cultural responses to political changes. Combinations of attributes produce cultural configurations, which provide social meaning, coordination and political justification. Our framework has several distinctive features. First, it proposes a “systems approach” to culture: the meaning and function of attributes are determined within the whole configuration and political equilibrium. Second, it emphasizes discontinuous or “saltational” changes in culture—rather than gradual, evolutionary changes—as attributes are reconnected and acquire new meanings in response to evolving circumstances and as outcomes in ongoing “cultural struggles”. Third, our framework puts the spotlight on how fluidly different cultures can respond to conditions, depending on the nature of their attributes and constraints on their connections. Finally, it enriches the study of the co-determination of political, institutional and cultural outcomes.
28832.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个研究文化与制度相互作用的新框架。我们将文化解释为一个“剧目库”，由（文化）属性组成，并允许对政治变革做出丰富的文化回应。属性的组合产生文化配置，这些配置提供社会意义、协调和政治正当性。我们的框架具有几个显著特征。首先，它提出了一种“系统方法”来研究文化：属性的意义和功能是在整个配置和政治均衡中确定的。其次，它强调文化中的不连续或“跳跃式”变化——而非渐进的、演化式的变化——因为属性会根据不断变化的环境而重新连接并获得新意义，并作为持续“文化斗争”的结果。第三，我们的框架聚焦于不同文化如何根据其属性的性质和对其连接的限制，灵活地应对各种条件。最后，它丰富了关于政治、制度和文化结果共同决定的研究。

28831.title: Earnings Inequality and the Minimum Wage: Evidence from Brazil
28831.zh_title: 收入不平等与最低工资：来自巴西的证据
28831.abstract: We show that a rise in the minimum wage accounts for a large decline in earnings inequality in Brazil since 1994. To this end, we combine rich administrative and survey data with an equilibrium model of the Brazilian labor market. Our results imply that the minimum wage has far-reaching spillover effects on wages higher up in the distribution, accounting for one-third of the 25.9 log point fall in the variance of log earnings in Brazil since 1994. At the same time, the minimum wage’s effects on employment and output are muted by reallocation of workers toward more productive firms.
28831.zh_abstract: 我们表明，最低工资的上涨是自1994年以来巴西收入不平等大幅下降的重要原因。为此，我们将丰富的行政和调查数据与巴西劳动力市场的均衡模型相结合。我们的结果表明，最低工资对工资分布较高层次产生了深远的溢出效应，解释了自1994年以来巴西对数收入方差下降25.9个对数点的三分之一。同时，最低工资对就业和产出的影响因工人向更具生产力的企业重新配置而减弱。
28831.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：E24, E25, E61, E64, J31, J38

28830.title: Deadly Discrimination: Implications of "Missing Girls" for Workplace Safety
28830.zh_title: 致命的歧视：“失踪女性”对工作场所安全的影响
28830.authors: Zhibo Tan, Shang-Jin Wei, Xiaobo Zhang
28830.abstract: We examine an indirect but potentially deadly consequence of the “missing girls” phenomenon. A shortage of brides causes many parents with sons of marriageable age to work harder and seek higher-paying but potentially dangerous jobs. In response, employers invest less in workplace safety, which in turn increases work-related mortality. Drawing from a broad range of data sets and taking advantage of large regional and temporal variations in sex ratios in China, we demonstrate that in areas with a more severe shortage of young women, the parents with unmarried sons suffer a significantly higher incidence of accidental injuries and workplace deaths.
28830.zh_abstract: 我们考察了“失踪女性”现象的一个间接但可能致命的后果。新娘的短缺导致许多有适婚年龄儿子的父母更加努力工作，并寻求收入更高但可能危险的工作。作为回应，雇主减少了对工作场所安全的投资，这反过来又增加了与工作相关的死亡率。利用广泛的数据集，并借助中国性别比例在地区和时期上的巨大差异，我们证明，在年轻女性短缺更严重的地区，有未婚儿子的父母遭受意外伤害和工作场所死亡的比率显著更高。

28829.title: Contagious Unemployment
28829.abstract: Recent micro evidence of how workers search for jobs is shown to have critical implications for the macroeconomic propagation of labor market shocks. Unemployed workers send over 10 times as many job applications in a month as their employed peers, but are less than half as likely per application to make a move. I interpret these patterns as the unemployed applying for more jobs that they are less likely to be a good fit for. During periods of high unemployment, it consequently becomes harder for firms to assert who is a good fit for the job. By raising the cost of recruiting, a short-lived adverse shock has a persistent negative impact on the job finding rate. I provide evidence that firms spend more time on recruiting when unemployment is high, quantitatively consistent with the theory.
28829.zh_abstract: 最近关于工人如何找工作的微观证据表明，这对劳动力市场冲击的宏观经济传导具有关键意义。失业工人每月发送的求职申请数量是就业同行的10倍以上，但每份申请成功入职的可能性却不到后者的一半。我将这些模式解释为：失业者申请了更多他们可能不太适合的工作。因此，在失业率高的时期，企业更难判断谁适合这份工作。通过提高招聘成本，一个短暂的负面冲击会对求职率产生持续的负面影响。我提供的证据表明，当失业率高时，企业会在招聘上花费更多时间，这与理论在数量上一致。

28828.title: Why Do Couples and Singles Save during Retirement? Household Heterogeneity and its Aggregate Implications
28828.zh_title: 为何夫妻与单身者在退休后储蓄？家庭异质性及其总体影响
28828.authors: Mariacristina De Nardi, Eric French, John Bailey Jones, Rory McGee
28828.abstract: We estimate a model of savings for retired couples and singles who face longevity and medical expense risks, and in which couples can leave bequests both when the first and last spouse dies. We show that saving motives vary by marital status, permanent income, and age. We find that most households save more for medical expenses than for bequests, but that richer households and couples, who hold most of the wealth, save more for bequests. As a result, bequest motives are a key determinant of aggregate retirement wealth.
28828.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个针对退休夫妻和单身者的储蓄模型，这些人群面临长寿和医疗费用风险，且夫妻可以在配偶一方去世时和双方都去世时留下遗产。我们发现储蓄动机因婚姻状况、永久收入和年龄而异。大多数家庭为医疗费用储蓄多于为遗产储蓄，但持有大部分财富的较富裕家庭和夫妻为遗产储蓄更多。因此，遗产动机是决定总体退休财富的关键因素。

28827.title: Stock Market Spillovers via the Global Production Network: Transmission of U.S. Monetary Policy
28827.zh_title: 通过全球生产网络的股市溢出效应：美国货币政策的传导
28827.abstract: We quantify the role of global production linkages in explaining spillovers of U.S. monetary policy shocks to stock returns across countries and sectors using a newly constructed dataset. Our estimation strategy is based on a standard open-economy production network model that delivers a spillover pattern consistent with a spatial autoregression (SAR) process. We use the SAR model to decompose the overall impact of U.S. monetary policy on global stock returns into a direct and a network effect. We ﬁnd that nearly 70% of the total impact of U.S. monetary policy shocks on country-sector stock returns are due to the network effect of global production linkages. Empirical counterfactuals show that shutting down global production linkages would reduce the total global impact of U.S. monetary policy shocks by half. Our results are robust to changes in the deﬁnitions of stock returns and monetary policy shocks, to controlling for correlates of the global ﬁnancial cycle, foreign monetary policy shocks, and to alternative empirical speciﬁcations.
28827.zh_abstract: 我们利用新构建的数据集，量化了全球生产关联在解释美国货币政策冲击对各国和各行业股票回报溢出效应中的作用。我们的估计策略基于一个标准的开放经济生产网络模型，该模型产生与空间自回归过程一致的溢出模式。我们使用空间自回归模型将美国货币政策对全球股票回报的总体影响分解为直接效应和网络效应。我们发现，美国货币政策冲击对国家-行业股票回报的总影响中，近70%归因于全球生产关联的网络效应。实证反事实分析表明，切断全球生产关联将使美国货币政策冲击的全球总影响减半。我们的结果对股票回报和货币政策冲击定义的改变、对全球金融周期相关因素和外国货币政策冲击的控制，以及替代性实证设定均保持稳健。

28826.title: Tax Evasion, Efficiency, and Bunching in the Presence of Enforcement Notches
28826.zh_title: 存在执法断点时的逃税、效率与聚集现象
28826.abstract: A recent literature has studied bunching at notches in tax systems; but work on the implications of bunching for welfare has been limited. We consider a setting where there are discrete changes in the enforcement of tax compliance at certain levels of reported income, creating notches that can lead to bunching. We find that greater levels of bunching can be associated with greater tax efficiency. A simulation exercise demonstrates that notches with greater bunching can be associated with higher welfare than notches with less bunching, and that a tax system with bunching at a notch can generate higher overall social welfare than a revenue-equivalent no-evasion linear tax.
28826.zh_abstract: 近期文献研究了税收系统中断点处的聚集现象，但关于聚集对福利影响的研究有限。我们考虑一种情形：在特定报告收入水平上，税收合规执法存在离散变化，从而形成可能导致聚集的断点。我们发现，更高的聚集水平可能与更高的税收效率相关。一项模拟练习表明，聚集程度更高的断点可能比聚集程度较低的断点带来更高的福利，并且存在断点聚集的税收系统可以产生比收入等效的无逃税线性税更高的总体社会福利。

28825.title: How Experiments with Children Inform Economics
28825.zh_title: 儿童实验如何为经济学提供洞见
28825.authors: John A. List, Ragan Petrie, Anya Samek
28825.abstract: In the past several decades the experimental method has lent deep insights into economics. One perhaps surprising area that has contributed is the experimental study of children, where advances as varied as the evolution of human behaviors that shape markets and institutions, to how early life influences shape later life outcomes, have been explored. We first develop a framework for economic preference measurement that provides a lens into how to interpret data from experiments with children. Next, we survey work that provides general empirical insights within our framework. Finally, we provide 10 tips for pulling off experiments with children, including factors such as taking into account child competencies, causal identification, and logistical issues related to recruitment and implementation. We envision the experimental study of children as a high growth research area in the coming decades as social scientists begin to more fully appreciate that children are active participants in markets who (might) respond predictably to economic incentives.
28825.zh_abstract: 过去几十年中，实验方法为经济学提供了深刻洞见。一个可能令人惊讶的贡献领域是儿童实验研究，其中探索了从塑造市场和制度的人类行为演化，到早期生活影响如何塑造后期生活结果等多样化的进展。我们首先构建了一个经济偏好测量框架，为如何解读儿童实验数据提供了视角。接着，我们综述了在该框架内提供一般性实证洞见的研究。最后，我们提供了成功开展儿童实验的10条建议，包括考虑儿童能力、因果识别以及招募和实施相关的后勤问题等因素。我们预计，随着社会科学家开始更充分地认识到儿童是市场的积极参与者，他们（可能）会对经济激励做出可预测的反应，儿童实验研究将在未来几十年成为一个高增长的研究领域。

28824.title: A Long and a Short Leg Make For a Wobbly Equilibrium
28824.zh_title: 一长一短两条腿导致不稳定的均衡
28824.authors: Nicolae B. Gârleanu, Stavros Panageas, Geoffery X. Zheng
28824.abstract: We document the historically bad performance of shorting strategies in late 2020 and early 2021. Short sellers started retreating several weeks before the dramatic growth in the online discussion of January 2021 and across numerous stocks, the majority of which were not heavily discussed online and did not experience an unusual increase in retail buying volume. We provide a model to explain how fears among short sellers can become self-fulfilling and lead to “run-type” behavior. The model also provides a novel explanation why rational short sellers may choose to leave the market even as mispricing widens.
28824.zh_abstract: 我们记录了2020年末和2021年初做空策略的历史性糟糕表现。在2021年1月在线讨论急剧增长之前的数周，卖空者已开始撤退，且涉及众多股票，其中大多数并未被在线讨论高度关注，也未经历零售购买量的异常增长。我们提供了一个模型来解释卖空者的恐惧如何能够自我实现并导致“挤兑型”行为。该模型还提供了一个新颖的解释，说明为何理性的卖空者可能在错误定价扩大时选择离开市场。

28823.title: Automated Enforcement of Irrigation Regulations and Social Pressure for Water Conservation
28823.zh_title: 灌溉法规的自动化执法与节水的社会压力
28823.authors: Jeremy D. West, Robert W. Fairlie, Bryan E. Pratt, Liam Rose
28823.abstract: This study evaluates two interventions for residential water conservation. Comparing households across an enforcement algorithm’s cutoff using a regression discontinuity design, we find that automated irrigation violation warnings cause substantial water conservation but also shift some consumption from regulated to unregulated hours within the week. In contrast, we show using data from a randomized experiment with the same customers that normative Home Water Reports reduce water use by a much smaller amount, but that this social pressure is effective during all hours both before and after automating irrigation policy enforcement. Our findings highlight the merits of implementing multidimensional conservation programs.
28823.zh_abstract: 本研究评估了两种住宅节水干预措施。通过断点回归设计比较执法算法临界值两侧的家庭，我们发现自动灌溉违规警告导致了显著的节水效果，但也将部分消费从一周内的受监管时段转移到了非监管时段。相比之下，我们利用同一客户的随机实验数据表明，规范性家庭用水报告减少的用水量要小得多，但这种社会压力在自动化灌溉政策执法之前和之后的所有时段都有效。我们的发现强调了实施多维节水计划的好处。
28823.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D04, L98, Q25, R22

28822.title: What Kinds of Distributed Generation Technologies Defer Network Expansions? Evidence from France
28822.zh_title: 哪些分布式发电技术能推迟电网扩容？来自法国的证据
28822.authors: Nicolas Astier, Ram Rajagopal, Frank A. Wolak
28822.abstract: This paper estimates the relationship between investments in five distributed generation technologies and hourly net injections to the distribution grid for over 2,000 substations in France between 2005 and 2018. We find that investments in distributed wind and solar capacity have little or no impact on the annual peak of hourly net injections to the distribution grid, while investments in hydroelectric and thermal distributed generation significantly reduce it. An optimistic analysis of battery storage suggests that high levels of investments are required for distributed wind and solar investments to deliver similar reductions in the annual peak of hourly net injections.
28822.zh_abstract: 本文估计了2005年至2018年间法国2000多个变电站的五种分布式发电技术投资与每小时净注入配电网电量之间的关系。我们发现，分布式风电和太阳能发电投资对配电网每小时净注入电量的年峰值几乎没有影响，而水电和热力分布式发电投资则显著降低了该峰值。对电池储能的乐观分析表明，分布式风电和太阳能投资需要达到高水平才能实现类似的每小时净注入电量年峰值降低效果。

28821.title: Religious Festivals and Economic Development: Evidence from the Timing of Mexican Saint Day Festivals
28821.zh_title: 宗教节日与经济发展：来自墨西哥圣日节庆时间的证据
28821.abstract: Does variation in how religious festivals are celebrated have economic consequences? We study the economic impacts of the timing of Catholic patron saint day festivals in Mexico. For causal identification, we exploit cross-locality variation in festival dates and in the timing of agricultural seasons. We estimate the impact of “agriculturally-coinciding” festivals (those coinciding with peak planting or harvest months) on long-run economic development of localities. Agriculturally-coinciding festivals lead to lower household income and worse development outcomes overall. These negative effects are likely due to lower agricultural productivity, which inhibits structural transformation out of agriculture. Agriculturally-coinciding festivals may nonetheless persist because they also lead to higher religiosity and social capital.
28821.zh_abstract: 宗教节日的庆祝方式差异是否会产生经济后果？我们研究了墨西哥天主教主保圣人节庆时间的经济影响。为进行因果识别，我们利用了不同地点节庆日期以及农业季节时间的差异。我们估计了“与农业重合”的节庆（即与播种或收获高峰期重合的节庆）对地方长期经济发展的影响。与农业重合的节庆导致家庭收入降低和总体发展结果恶化。这些负面效应可能源于较低的农业生产力，从而抑制了从农业的结构转型。然而，与农业重合的节庆可能仍然持续存在，因为它们也导致了更高的宗教虔诚度和社会资本。

28820.title: Gender Differences in Job Search and the Earnings Gap: Evidence from the Field and Lab
28820.zh_title: 求职过程中的性别差异与收入差距：来自实地与实验室的证据
28820.authors: Patricia Cortés, Jessica Pan, Ernesto Reuben, Laura Pilossoph, Basit Zafar
28820.abstract: This paper investigates gender differences in the job search process, both in the field and lab. First, we collect rich information on initial job offers and acceptances from undergraduates of Boston University's Questrom School of Business. We document two novel empirical facts: (1) there is a clear gender difference in the timing of job offer acceptance, with women accepting jobs substantially earlier than men, and (2) there is a clear gender earnings gap in accepted offers, which narrows in favor of women over the course of the job search period. To rationalize these patterns, we develop a job search model that incorporates gender differences in risk aversion and over-optimism about prospective offers. We validate the model's assumptions and predictions using the survey data, and present empirical evidence that the job search patterns in the field can be partly explained by the greater risk aversion displayed by women and the higher levels of over-optimism displayed by men. Next, we replicate the findings from the field in a specially-designed laboratory experiment that features sequential job search, and provide direct evidence on the purported mechanisms. Our findings highlight the importance of risk preferences and beliefs for gender differences in job-finding behavior, and consequently, early-career wage gaps among the highly-skilled.
28820.zh_abstract: 本文从实地和实验室两个层面研究了求职过程中的性别差异。首先，我们收集了波士顿大学奎斯特罗姆商学院本科生的初始工作机会和接受情况的丰富信息。我们记录了两个新颖的实证事实：（1）工作机会接受时间存在明显的性别差异，女性接受工作的时机显著早于男性；（2）已接受的工作机会中存在明显的性别收入差距，且随着求职周期的推进，这一差距以有利于女性的方式缩小。为了解释这些模式，我们构建了一个包含风险规避和关于未来工作机会过度乐观的性别差异的求职模型。我们利用调查数据验证了模型的假设和预测，并提供了实证证据，表明实地中的求职模式可以部分由女性表现出的更高风险规避和男性表现出的更高水平过度乐观来解释。接下来，我们在一个专门设计的、具有序列求职特征的实验室实验中复制了实地发现，并对所提出的机制提供了直接证据。我们的研究结果强调了风险偏好和信念对于高技能人群在求职行为中的性别差异，以及由此产生的早期职业生涯工资差距的重要性。

28819.title: The Long-Run Effects of Sports Club Vouchers for Primary School Children
28819.zh_title: 小学生体育俱乐部代金券的长期效应
28819.authors: Jan Marcus, Thomas Siedler, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
28819.abstract: Starting in 2009, the German state of Saxony distributed sports club membership vouchers among all 33,000 third graders in the state. The policy’s objective was to encourage them to develop a long-term habit of exercising. In 2018, we carried out a large register-based survey among several cohorts in Saxony and two neighboring states. Our difference-indifferences estimations show that, even after a decade, awareness of the voucher program was significantly higher in the treatment group. We also find that youth received and redeemed the vouchers. However, we do not find significant short- or long-term effects on sports club membership, physical activity, overweightness, or motor skills.
28819.zh_abstract: 从2009年开始，德国萨克森州向该州所有33000名三年级学生发放了体育俱乐部会员资格代金券。该政策的目标是鼓励他们养成长期锻炼的习惯。2018年，我们在萨克森州和两个邻近州对几个队列进行了一项大规模的基于登记册的调查。我们的双重差分估计显示，即使在十年后，处理组对代金券项目的认知度仍然显著更高。我们还发现，青少年收到了代金券并进行了兑换。然而，我们没有发现对体育俱乐部会员资格、体育活动、超重或运动技能有显著的短期或长期影响。
28819.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：H71, I12, I14, I18, I28, I38, Z28

28818.title: Disbursing Emergency Relief through Utilities: Evidence from Ghana
28818.zh_title: 通过公用事业发放紧急救济：来自加纳的证据
28818.authors: Susanna B. Berkouwer, Pierre E. Biscaye, Steven L. Puller, Catherine Wolfram
28818.abstract: Government transfer programs to distribute food, water, or electricity at low or no cost have been widespread during the COVID-19 global health crisis. How does program design affect the efficiency and distributional implications of these policies? And what design features determine their political popularity? We study these questions in the context of a program to distribute relief through the electric utility in Accra, Ghana, using data from 1,200 households surveyed during the COVID-19 crisis. We find that distributing relief through electricity transfers has significant advantages. It enables an immediate government response to the crisis because it leverages the existing financial infrastructure between the government utility and households. Moreover, theoretical efficiency concerns about in-kind transfers are mitigated because the transfers are inframarginal for most households and electricity credit can be stored, with many even preferring electricity transfers over cash. These advantages do not preclude delays in transfer receipt and the exclusion of some eligible households, and the program is regressive in both design and implementation. The households least likely to receive relief are those who use less electricity, pay a landlord or other intermediary for electricity, or share an electricity meter with other users – all common among low-income electricity consumers in urban settings. Finally, transfer receipt increases support for the governing party, but support for the program drops significantly if even a fraction of its costs are to be recovered through future electricity tariff increases. Concerns around disbursing relief through utility transfers in this context thus arise not from efficiency loss, but from regressivity, distributional challenges, and politicization.
28818.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19全球健康危机期间，以低价或免费提供食品、水或电力的政府转移支付项目非常普遍。项目设计如何影响这些政策的效率和分配效应？哪些设计特征决定了它们的政治受欢迎程度？我们利用在COVID-19危机期间对加纳阿克拉1200户家庭调查的数据，在一个通过电力公司发放救济的项目背景下研究了这些问题。我们发现，通过电力转移支付发放救济具有显著优势。它能够使政府立即应对危机，因为它利用了政府公用事业与家庭之间现有的金融基础设施。此外，关于实物转移支付的理论效率担忧得到了缓解，因为对于大多数家庭而言，这些转移支付是边际内的，并且电力信用可以储存，许多人甚至更偏好电力转移支付而非现金。这些优势并不能避免转移支付接收的延迟和对某些合格家庭的排斥，而且该项目在设计和实施上都是累退的。最不可能获得救济的家庭是那些用电较少、向房东或其他中介支付电费、或与其他用户共享电表的家庭——这些特征在城市环境中的低收入电力消费者中很常见。最后，获得转移支付增加了对执政党的支持，但如果项目成本的哪怕一小部分要通过未来的电价上涨来收回，对该项目的支持度就会显著下降。因此，在这种背景下，通过公用事业转移支付发放救济的担忧并非源于效率损失，而是源于累退性、分配挑战和政治化。

28817.title: Measuring Quality Effects in Equilibrium
28817.zh_title: 均衡中质量效应的测量
28817.authors: Seth Richards-Shubik, Mark S. Roberts, Julie M. Donohue
28817.abstract: Unlike demand studies in other industries, models of provider demand in health care often must omit a price or any other factor that equilibrates the market. Estimates of the consumer response to quality may consequently be attenuated, if the limited capacity of individual providers prevents some consumers from obtaining higher quality. We propose a tractable method to address this problem by adding a congestion effect to standard discrete-choice models. We show analytically how this improves forecasts of the consumer response to quality. We then apply this method to the market for heart surgery, and find that the attenuation bias in estimated quality effects can be important empirically.
28817.zh_abstract: 与其他行业的需求研究不同，医疗保健领域的提供者需求模型通常必须省略价格或任何其他平衡市场的因素。如果个体提供者的有限容量阻止了一些消费者获得更高质量，那么对消费者对质量反应的估计可能会因此被削弱。我们提出了一种易于处理的方法，通过在标准离散选择模型中增加一个拥堵效应来解决这个问题。我们从理论上展示了这如何改进对消费者对质量反应的预测。然后，我们将此方法应用于心脏手术市场，并发现估计质量效应中的衰减偏差在实证上可能是重要的。

28876.title: The Donut Effect of Covid-19 on Cities
28876.zh_title: 新冠疫情对城市的“甜甜圈效应”
28876.abstract: Using data from the US Postal Service and Zillow, we quantify the effect of Covid-19 on migration patterns and real estate markets in US cities. We find three key results. First, within large US metro areas, households, businesses and real estate demand shift from central business districts (CBDs) to lower density suburbs and exurbs. We label this the “Donut Effect”, reflecting the hollowing out of city centers and growth of suburban outer rings. Second, we observe sizeable donuts in large cities, smaller donuts for mid-sized cities and essentially nothing for small cities, on average. Third, most households leaving city centers move to suburbs of the same city, some move to small metros and few move to rural areas. To rationalize these findings we note that post-pandemic working patterns will typically be hybrid, with workers commuting a few days a week. This is less than pre-pandemic, making longer commutes more common, but is frequent enough to keep most, though not all, workers near their place of work.
28876.zh_abstract: 利用美国邮政总局和Zillow的数据，我们量化了新冠疫情对美国城市迁移模式和房地产市场的影响。我们发现了三个关键结果。首先，在美国大型都市区内，家庭、企业和房地产需求从中央商务区转向低密度的郊区和远郊。我们将此称为“甜甜圈效应”，反映了城市中心的空心化和郊区外环的增长。其次，平均而言，我们在大城市观察到显著的甜甜圈效应，中等城市效应较小，而小城市基本没有效应。第三，大多数离开城市中心的家庭搬到了同一城市的郊区，一些搬到了小都市区，很少搬到农村地区。为了合理解释这些发现，我们指出，疫情后的工作模式通常是混合式的，员工每周通勤几天。这比疫情前要少，使得更长的通勤更为常见，但频率仍然足够高，足以让大多数（尽管不是全部）员工留在工作地点附近。

28875.title: Politics and the Distribution of Federal Funds: Evidence from Federal Legislation in Response to COVID-19
28875.zh_title: 政治与联邦资金分配：来自应对新冠疫情联邦立法的证据
28875.abstract: COVID-19 relief legislation offers a unique setting to study how political representation shapes the distribution of federal assistance to state and local governments. We provide evidence of a substantial small-state bias: an additional Senator or Representative per million residents predicts an additional $\$670$ dollars in aid per capita across the four relief packages. Alignment with the Democratic party predicts increases in states’ allocations through legislation designed after the January 2021 political transition. This benefit of partisan alignment operates through the American Rescue Plan Act’s sheer size, as well as the formulas through which it distributed transportation and general relief funds.
28875.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情救助立法为研究政治代表权如何塑造联邦援助向州和地方政府的分配提供了一个独特的环境。我们提供了显著的小州偏见的证据：每百万居民额外增加一名参议员或众议员，预示着在四项救助计划中人均援助额增加670美元。与民主党的结盟预示着在2021年1月政治过渡后通过立法设计的各州拨款增加。这种党派结盟的好处通过《美国救援计划法案》的庞大规模，以及该法案分配交通和一般救助资金的公式来实现。
28875.meta: Programs：PE, POL；JEL：E62, H12, H71, H72, H77

28874.title: Family Background, Neighborhoods and Intergenerational Mobility
28874.zh_title: 家庭背景、社区与代际流动性
28874.abstract: This chapter reviews the literature on intergenerational mobility. While our review is centered around the large empirical literature on this topic, we also give a brief discussion of some of the relevant theory. We consider three strands of the empirical literature. First, we discuss how to measure intergenerational persistence in various socio-economic outcomes. We discuss both measurement challenges and some notable findings. We then turn to quantifying the importance of family environment and genetic factors for children’s outcomes. We describe the pros and cons of various approaches as well as key findings. The third strand is concerned with drawing causal inferences about how children’s outcomes are affected by specific features of their family environment. We discuss a wide range of environmental features, including the neighborhoods in which children grow up. We critically assess what conclusions one may and may not draw from certain widely cited empirical studies of neighborhoods and intergenerational mobility.
28874.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了关于代际流动性的文献。虽然我们的综述围绕这一主题的大量实证文献展开，但我们也简要讨论了一些相关理论。我们考虑了实证文献的三个分支。首先，我们讨论了如何衡量各种社会经济结果中的代际持续性。我们既讨论了衡量挑战，也讨论了一些显著发现。然后，我们转向量化家庭环境和遗传因素对儿童结果的重要性。我们描述了各种方法的优缺点以及关键发现。第三个分支涉及关于儿童结果如何受到其家庭环境特定特征影响的因果推断。我们讨论了广泛的环境特征，包括儿童成长的社区。我们批判性地评估了从某些被广泛引用的关于社区和代际流动性的实证研究中可以得出和不能得出哪些结论。

28873.title: When Innovation Goes Wrong: Technological Regress and the Opioid Epidemic
28873.zh_title: 当创新出错时：技术退步与阿片类药物流行
28873.authors: David M. Cutler, Edward L. Glaeser
28873.abstract: The fourfold increase in opioid deaths between 2000 and 2017 rivals even the COVID-19 pandemic as a health crisis for America. Why did it happen? Measures of demand for pain relief – physical pain and despair – are high and in many cases rising, but their increase was nowhere near as large as the increase in deaths. The primary shift is in supply, primarily of new forms of allegedly safer narcotics. These new pain relievers flowed in greater volume to areas with more physical pain and mental health impairment, but since their apparent safety was an illusion, opioid deaths followed.
