By the end of the 2000s, restrictions on legal opioids led to further supply-side innovations which created the burgeoning illegal market that accounts for the bulk of opioid deaths today. Because opioid use is easier to start than end, America’s opioid epidemic is likely to persist for some time.
28873.zh_abstract: 2000年至2017年间阿片类药物死亡人数增加了四倍，这甚至可与新冠疫情相媲美，成为美国的一场健康危机。为什么会发生这种情况？对疼痛缓解的需求指标——身体疼痛和绝望——很高，并且在许多情况下还在上升，但其增长幅度远不及死亡人数的增长。主要变化在于供应方面，主要是新型号称更安全的麻醉药品。这些新的止痛药以更大的数量流向身体疼痛和精神健康受损更严重的地区，但由于其表面上的安全性是一种幻觉，阿片类药物死亡随之而来。到2000年代末，对合法阿片类药物的限制导致了进一步的供给侧创新，催生了蓬勃发展的非法市场，该市场如今占据了阿片类药物死亡的大部分。由于阿片类药物的使用比戒除更容易开始，美国的阿片类药物流行可能会持续一段时间。

28872.title: Exchange Rates and Monetary Policy with Heterogeneous Agents: Sizing up the Real Income Channel
28872.zh_title: 汇率与货币政策：异质性主体视角下的实际收入渠道评估
28872.authors: Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Martin Souchier, Ludwig Straub
28872.abstract: Introducing heterogeneous households into a New Keynesian small open economy model amplifies the real income channel of exchange rates: the rise in import prices from a depreciation lowers households’ real income, and leads them to cut back on spending. When the sum of import and export elasticities is one, this channel is offset by a larger Keynesian multiplier, heterogeneity is irrelevant, and expenditure switching drives the output response. With plausibly lower short-term elasticities, however, the real income channel dominates, and the depreciation can be contractionary for output. This weakens monetary transmission and creates a dilemma for policymakers facing capital outflows. Endogenous portfolios and delayed import price pass-through weaken the real income channel, while heterogeneous consumption baskets can strengthen it.
28872.zh_abstract: 将异质性家庭引入新凯恩斯小型开放经济模型会放大汇率的实际收入渠道：本币贬值导致的进口价格上升降低了家庭的实际收入，并导致他们削减支出。当进口和出口弹性之和为1时，这一渠道被更大的凯恩斯乘数所抵消，异质性无关紧要，支出转换主导了产出反应。然而，在短期弹性合理较低的情况下，实际收入渠道占主导地位，贬值可能对产出产生紧缩效应。这削弱了货币传导，并为面临资本外流的政策制定者制造了两难困境。内生投资组合和延迟的进口价格传导削弱了实际收入渠道，而异质性消费篮子则可能强化该渠道。

28871.title: This Time is Not so Different: Income Dynamics During the COVID-19 Recession
28871.zh_title: 这次并非如此不同：新冠疫情衰退期间的收入动态
28871.authors: Brian D. Bell, Nicholas Bloom, Jack Blundell
28871.abstract: We use a UK employer-employee administrative earnings dataset to investigate the response of earnings and hours to business cycles. Exploiting our long panel of data from 1975 to 2020 we find wide heterogeneity in the exposure of different types of workers to aggregate shocks. Employees who are younger, male, lower-skilled, non-union, and working in smaller private sector firms show the largest earnings response to recessions. The qualitative patterns of earnings changes across workers observed in the COVID-19 recession are broadly as predicted using the previously estimated exposures and size of the GDP shock. This suggests the COVID-19 recession in terms of its impact responses was relatively similar to those that have gone before, but the GDP shock was far larger in absolute size. Compared to aggregate shocks, we find a relatively small role of firm-specific shocks, suggesting macro shocks play an outsized role in individual earnings dynamics.
28871.zh_abstract: 我们使用英国雇主-雇员行政收入数据集来研究收入和工时对商业周期的反应。利用我们1975年至2020年的长面板数据，我们发现不同类型工人对总体冲击的暴露程度存在广泛异质性。较年轻、男性、技能较低、非工会成员以及在较小私营企业工作的员工，其收入对衰退的反应最大。在新冠疫情衰退中观察到的工人收入变化的定性模式，大致可以通过先前估计的暴露程度和GDP冲击规模来预测。这表明，就其冲击反应而言，新冠疫情衰退与之前的衰退相对相似，但GDP冲击的绝对规模要大得多。与总体冲击相比，我们发现企业特定冲击的作用相对较小，这表明宏观冲击在个人收入动态中扮演着不成比例的重要角色。

28870.title: Reallocating Liquidity to Resolve a Crisis: Evidence from the Panic of 1873
28870.zh_title: 重新配置流动性以解决危机：来自1873年恐慌的证据
28870.authors: Haelim Anderson, Kinda Cheryl Hachem, Simpson Zhang
28870.abstract: We study financial stability with constraints on central bank intervention in a model with belief-driven bank runs. A pecuniary externality arises in the decentralized market for interbank loans and leads to excessively many bank failures. A forced reallocation of liquidity across banks improves social welfare and can be implemented through the issuance of clearinghouse loan certificates, such as those issued in New York City during the Panic of 1873. A new dataset constructed from archival records reveals that the New York Clearinghouse issued loan certificates to member banks in the way our model suggests would have helped resolve the panic.
28870.zh_abstract: 我们在一个信念驱动的银行挤兑模型中研究了存在央行干预约束时的金融稳定性。银行间贷款的去中心化市场中出现了货币外部性，导致过多的银行倒闭。强制在银行间重新配置流动性可以提高社会福利，并且可以通过发行清算所贷款凭证来实施，例如1873年恐慌期间纽约市发行的那些凭证。根据档案记录构建的新数据集显示，纽约清算所以我们的模型建议有助于解决恐慌的方式向其成员银行发放了贷款凭证。
28870.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ME；JEL：D53, D62, E42, E50, G01, N21

28869.title: Monetary Policy, Redistribution, and Risk Premia
28869.zh_title: 货币政策、再分配与风险溢价
28869.abstract: We study the transmission of monetary policy through risk premia in a heterogeneous agent New Keynesian environment. Heterogeneity in households' marginal propensity to take risk (MPR) summarizes differences in portfolio choice on the margin. An unexpected reduction in the nominal interest rate redistributes to households with high MPRs, lowering risk premia and amplifying the stimulus to the real economy. Quantitatively, this mechanism rationalizes the role of news about future excess returns in driving the stock market response to monetary policy shocks and amplifies their real effects by 1.3-1.4 times.
28869.zh_abstract: 我们在一个异质性主体新凯恩斯环境中研究货币政策通过风险溢价的传导。家庭承担风险的边际倾向的异质性概括了边际上投资组合选择的差异。名义利率的意外降低会向具有高承担风险边际倾向的家庭进行再分配，从而降低风险溢价并放大对实体经济的刺激。从数量上看，这一机制解释了关于未来超额收益的新闻在推动股市对货币政策冲击反应中的作用，并将其实际效应放大了1.3至1.4倍。

28868.title: The Resilience of the U.S. Corporate Bond Market During Financial Crises
28868.zh_title: 美国公司债券市场在金融危机中的韧性
28868.abstract: Corporate bond markets proved remarkably resilient against a sharp contraction caused by the 2020 Covid-19 pandemic. We document three important findings: (1) bond issuance increased immediately when the contraction hit, whereas, in contrast, syndicated loan issuance was low; (2) Federal Reserve interventions increased bond issuance, while loan issuance also increased, but to a lesser degree; and (3) bond issuance was concentrated in the investment-grade segment for large and profitable issuers. We compare these results to previous crises and recessions and document similar patterns. We conclude that the U.S. bond market is an important and resilient source of funding for corporations.
28868.zh_abstract: 公司债券市场在应对2020年新冠疫情引发的急剧收缩中表现出显著的韧性。我们记录了三个重要发现：（1）当经济收缩发生时，债券发行立即增加，而相比之下，银团贷款发行量较低；（2）美联储的干预措施增加了债券发行，同时贷款发行也有所增加，但幅度较小；（3）债券发行集中在投资级领域，且发行方为大型且盈利的企业。我们将这些结果与以往的危机和衰退进行比较，并记录了类似的模式。我们得出结论，美国债券市场是公司融资的一个重要且具有韧性的来源。
28868.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E51, G01, G21, G23

28867.title: Evidence and Lessons on the Health Impacts of Public Health Funding from the Fight against HIV/AIDS
28867.zh_title: 公共卫生资金对健康影响的证据与教训：来自抗击HIV/AIDS的经验
28867.abstract: A key approach used by federal governments to address public health issues is to allocate federal funds to support local responses, but little is known about the effectiveness of this approach for improving health. This study examines the impact of federal public health funds allocated to U.S. cities through the U.S. government’s primary mechanism for combating HIV/AIDS for the past three decades. The empirical approach identifies the impact of this funding by studying funding variation that comes from policy features that resulted in large funding differences among cities that were originally on parallel HIV/AIDS trajectories. The findings indicate that an HIV/AIDS death has been prevented for every $\$334,000$ allocated through the city-level funding and that the $\$19$ billion allocated to cities through this program through 2018 has saved approximately 57,000 lives, which represents over $\$560$ billion of value in terms of lives saved assuming a value of a statistical life of $\$10$ million. The findings also indicate that funding differences across cities have been a major contributor to the uneven progress in combating HIV/AIDS currently observed across the United States that has alarmed public health leaders. Thus, while this analysis supports allocating federal funds to local areas as part of a public health strategy, these funds being effective demonstrates how sustained differences in areas’ receipt of federal public health funds can contribute to the development of health disparities across areas, as has occurred with HIV/AIDS.
28867.zh_abstract: 联邦政府应对公共卫生问题的一个关键方法是分配联邦资金以支持地方应对措施，但关于这种方法在改善健康方面的有效性知之甚少。本研究考察了通过美国政府过去三十年来抗击HIV/AIDS的主要机制分配给美国城市的联邦公共卫生资金的影响。实证方法通过研究政策特征导致的资金差异来识别这种资金的影响，这些政策特征使得原本处于平行HIV/AIDS轨迹的城市之间出现了巨大的资金差异。研究结果表明，通过城市级资金每分配334,000美元，就预防了一例HIV/AIDS死亡；截至2018年，通过该项目分配给城市的190亿美元已挽救了约57,000人的生命，假设统计生命价值为1000万美元，这相当于超过5600亿美元的生命价值。研究结果还表明，城市间的资金差异是当前美国各地在抗击HIV/AIDS方面进展不均衡的主要因素，这种不均衡已引起公共卫生领导人的警惕。因此，尽管本分析支持将联邦资金分配给地方作为公共卫生战略的一部分，但这些资金的有效性表明，各地区在获得联邦公共卫生资金方面的持续差异如何导致地区间健康差距的发展，正如HIV/AIDS领域所发生的情况。

28866.title: Common Agent or Double Agent? Pharmacy Benefit Managers in the Prescription Drug Market
28866.zh_title: 共同代理人还是双重代理人？处方药市场中的药品福利管理者
28866.authors: Rena M. Conti, Brigham Frandsen, Michael L. Powell, James B. Rebitzer
28866.abstract: A small number of pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) dominate the market for branded pharmaceuticals in the United States, but they are controversial, and their economic significance is poorly understood. Large PBMs are market intermediaries. They are also a common agent operating formularies on behalf of various third-party payers. We present a model that captures these dual roles and also clarifies the economics of drug rebates. We find that PBM-run formularies enhance the efficiency of drug markets, but when PBMs are highly concentrated these gains accrue to PBMs rather than consumers or drug makers. We also identify threats to formulary efficiency including most favored nation agreements between drug makers and PBMs and the strategic setting of high list prices by drug makers. Our model also offers insights into current market structures and a framework for assessing market reforms.
28866.zh_abstract: 少数药品福利管理者（PBM）主导着美国的品牌药品市场，但它们存在争议，其经济意义也鲜为人知。大型PBM是市场中介机构。它们也是代表各种第三方支付方运营处方集的共同代理人。我们提出了一个模型来捕捉这些双重角色，并阐明药品回扣的经济学原理。我们发现，PBM运营的处方集提高了药品市场的效率，但当PBM高度集中时，这些收益会归于PBM而非消费者或药品制造商。我们还识别出对处方集效率的威胁，包括药品制造商与PBM之间的最惠国协议以及药品制造商战略性设定高标价。我们的模型还为当前市场结构提供了见解，并为评估市场改革提供了一个框架。

28865.title: Entrepreneurial Reluctance: Talent and Firm Creation in China
28865.zh_title: 创业惰性：中国的人才与公司创建
28865.authors: Chong-En Bai, Ruixue Jia, Hongbin Li, Xin Wang
28865.abstract: The theoretical literature has long noted that talent can be used in both the entrepreneurial and non-entrepreneurial sectors, and its allocation depends on the reward structure. We test these hypotheses by linking administrative college admissions data for 1.8 million individuals with the universe of firm registration records in China. Within a college, we find that individuals with higher college entrance exam scores – the most important measure of talent in this context – are less likely to create firms, but, when they do, their firms are more successful than those of their lower-score counterparts. Additional survey data suggest that higher-score individuals enjoy higher wages and are more likely to join the state sector. Moreover, the score-to-firm creation relationship varies greatly across industry, according to the size of the state sector. These findings suggest that the score is positively associated with both entrepreneurial ability and wage-job ability but higher-score individuals are attracted away by wage jobs, particularly those of the state sector.
28865.zh_abstract: 理论文献长期以来指出，人才既可用于创业部门也可用于非创业部门，其配置取决于回报结构。我们通过将180万人的行政大学录取数据与中国的企业注册记录全样本进行匹配来检验这些假设。在同一所大学内，我们发现高考成绩（在此背景下衡量人才的最重要指标）较高的个人创建公司的可能性较低，但当他们创建公司时，其公司比成绩较低的同龄人更成功。额外的调查数据表明，成绩较高的个人享有更高的工资，并且更有可能加入国有部门。此外，成绩与公司创建之间的关系因行业而异，取决于国有部门的规模。这些发现表明，成绩与创业能力和工资就业能力均呈正相关，但成绩较高的个人被工资就业（尤其是国有部门的工资就业）所吸引。
28865.meta: Programs：ED, PE, POL, PR；JEL：H11, J24, O12, O15

28864.title: Medical Innovation and Health Disparities
28864.authors: Barton Hamilton, Andrés Hincapié, Emma C. Kalish, Nicholas W. Papageorge
28864.abstract: Health-maximizing and welfare-maximizing behaviors can be at odds, especially among disadvantaged groups, which can contribute to health disparities. To investigate this point, we estimate a lifecycle model of medication and labor supply decisions using data on HIV-positive men. We use the model to evaluate the disparate consequences of an effective HIV treatment innovation that had harsh side effects: HAART. Measured in lifetime utility gains, HAART disproportionately benefited patients with more education. Lower-educated men were more likely to avoid HAART due to its side effects that interfered with work. To illustrate the wedge between health and welfare, we simulate the effects of a HAART treatment mandate, which mimics assignment to treatment in a clinical trial. The mandate improves health, which would be viewed as a success in a randomized trial. However, clinical trials, which often focus solely on health outcomes, can mask downsides of the treatment including its distributional consequences: the mandate increases inequality as measured by lifetime welfare because lower-educated men are more likely to stop working due to HAART-induced side effects. In contrast, a counterfactual policy simulation that provides a non-labor income subsidy increases HAART adoption and improves health, especially among lower-education individuals. Broadly, our study illustrates that the evaluation of medical innovations may be incomplete absent an understanding of their distributional consequences across different groups of patients.
28864.zh_abstract: 健康最大化和福利最大化行为可能相互冲突，尤其是在弱势群体中，这可能导致健康差距。为了研究这一点，我们使用HIV阳性男性的数据估计了一个关于服药和劳动供给决策的生命周期模型。我们利用该模型评估了一种有效但具有严重副作用的HIV治疗创新（HAART）所带来的不同后果。以终身效用增益衡量，HAART使受教育程度较高的患者获得了不成比例的益处。受教育程度较低的男性更可能因HAART的副作用干扰工作而避免使用它。为了说明健康与福利之间的差距，我们模拟了HAART强制治疗的效果，这类似于临床试验中的治疗分配。强制治疗改善了健康，这在随机试验中会被视为成功。然而，通常仅关注健康结果的临床试验可能掩盖治疗的负面影响，包括其分配后果：强制治疗增加了以终身福利衡量的不平等，因为受教育程度较低的男性更可能因HAART引起的副作用而停止工作。相比之下，一项提供非劳动收入补贴的反事实政策模拟增加了HAART的采用并改善了健康，尤其是在受教育程度较低的人群中。总体而言，我们的研究表明，如果不了解医疗创新在不同患者群体中的分配后果，对其评估可能是不完整的。
28864.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：I12, I14, I20, J2, O31

28863.title: Does Pain Lead to Job Loss? A Panel Study for Germany
28863.zh_title: 疼痛会导致失业吗？德国的一项面板研究
28863.authors: Alan Piper, David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
28863.abstract: The cross-sectional association between pain and unemployment is well-established. But the absence of panel data containing data on pain and labor market status has meant less is known about the direction of any causal linkage. Those longitudinal studies that do examine the link between pain and subsequent labor market transitions suggest results are sensitive to the measurement of pain and model specification. We contribute to this literature using large-scale panel data from the German Socio-Economic Panel (GSOEP) for the period 2002 to 2018. We show that pain leads to job loss. Workers suffering pain are more likely than others to leave their job for unemployment or economic inactivity. This probability rises with the frequency of the pain suffered in the previous month. The effect persists having accounted for fixed unobserved differences across workers, is apparent among those who otherwise report good general health and is robust to the inclusion of controls for mental health, life satisfaction and the employee’s occupation.
28863.zh_abstract: 疼痛与失业之间的横截面关联已得到充分证实。但由于缺乏包含疼痛和劳动力市场状况数据的面板数据，关于任何因果联系的方向知之甚少。那些确实考察疼痛与后续劳动力市场转型之间联系的纵向研究表明，结果对疼痛的测量和模型设定很敏感。我们利用2002年至2018年德国社会经济面板（GSOEP）的大规模面板数据为这一文献做出贡献。我们表明，疼痛会导致失业。遭受疼痛的工人比其他人更有可能因失业或经济不活跃而离职。这种概率随着上个月遭受疼痛的频率而上升。在考虑了工人之间未观察到的固定差异后，这种效应仍然存在，在那些报告总体健康状况良好的人中也很明显，并且在对心理健康、生活满意度和员工职业进行控制后依然稳健。

28862.title: Tackling the Substance Abuse Crisis: The Role of Access to Treatment Facilities
28862.zh_title: 应对药物滥用危机：治疗设施可及性的作用
28862.abstract: The continuing drug overdose crisis in the U.S. has highlighted the urgent need for greater access to treatment. This paper examines the impact of openings and closings of substance abuse treatment facilities in New Jersey on emergency room visits for substance abuse issues among nearby residents. We find that drug-related ER visits increase by 16.6% after a facility closure and decrease by 9.5% after an opening. The effects are largest in relatively under-served areas, among Black residents, and among males. They are smaller for the middle aged than for either younger or older people. The results suggest that expanding access to treatment results in significant reductions in morbidity related to drug abuse.
28862.zh_abstract: 美国持续的药物过量危机凸显了对更大治疗可及性的迫切需求。本文考察了新泽西州药物滥用治疗设施的开放和关闭对附近居民因药物滥用问题而前往急诊室就诊的影响。我们发现，设施关闭后，与药物相关的急诊就诊增加了16.6%，而开放后减少了9.5%。这些影响在相对服务不足的地区、黑人居民和男性中最大。对中年人的影响小于对年轻人或老年人的影响。结果表明，扩大治疗可及性可显著降低与药物滥用相关的发病率。

28861.title: Learning about Homelessness Using Linked Survey and Administrative Data
28861.zh_title: 利用关联的调查和行政数据了解无家可归问题
28861.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Angela Wyse, Alexa Grunwaldt, Carla Medalia, Derek Wu
28861.abstract: Official poverty statistics and even the extreme poverty literature largely ignore people experiencing homelessness. In this paper, we examine the characteristics, labor market attachment, geographic mobility, earnings, and safety net utilization of this population in order to understand their economic well-being. This paper is the first to examine these outcomes at the national level using administrative data on income and government program receipt. It is part of the Comprehensive Income Dataset project, which combines household survey data with administrative records to improve estimates of income and related statistics. Specifically, we use restricted microdata from the 2010 Decennial Census, which enumerates both sheltered and unsheltered homeless people, the 2006-2016 American Community Survey (ACS), which surveys sheltered homeless people, and longitudinal shelter-use data from several major U.S. cities. We link these data to longitudinal administrative tax records as well as administrative data on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), veterans’ benefits, Medicare, Medicaid, housing assistance, and mortality. Our approach benefits from large samples that offer a guide to national homelessness patterns and allow us to compare estimates between data sources, including the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)’s point-in-time (PIT) counts. By shedding light on issues of data linkage and survey coverage among homeless people, this paper contributes to efforts to better incorporate this hard-to-survey population into income and poverty estimates.
28861.zh_abstract: 官方贫困统计甚至极端贫困文献在很大程度上忽略了无家可归人群。在本文中，我们考察了这一人群的特征、劳动力市场依附度、地理流动性、收入和安全网利用情况，以了解他们的经济福祉。本文首次利用关于收入和政府项目领取情况的行政数据在国家层面考察这些结果。它是综合收入数据集项目的一部分，该项目将住户调查数据与行政记录相结合，以改进收入及相关统计的估计。具体来说，我们使用了2010年十年人口普查的限制性微观数据（该普查统计了有庇护和无庇护的无家可归者）、2006-2016年美国社区调查（该调查对有庇护的无家可归者进行抽样）以及来自美国几个主要城市的纵向庇护所使用数据。我们将这些数据与纵向行政税务记录以及关于补充营养援助计划、退伍军人福利、医疗保险、医疗补助、住房援助和死亡率的行政数据相关联。我们的方法受益于大样本，这些样本为国家无家可归模式提供了指导，并使我们能够比较不同数据来源（包括住房和城市发展部的时点计数）之间的估计。通过揭示无家可归者中的数据关联和调查覆盖问题，本文有助于更好地将这一难以调查的人群纳入收入和贫困估计的努力。

28860.title: Competition in Pricing Algorithms
28860.abstract: We document new facts about pricing technology using high-frequency data, and we examine the implications for competition. Some online retailers employ technology that allows for more frequent price changes and automated responses to price changes by rivals. Motivated by these facts, we consider a model in which firms can differ in pricing frequency and choose pricing algorithms that are a function of rivals’ prices. In competitive (Markov perfect) equilibrium, the introduction of simple pricing algorithms can generate price dispersion, increase price levels, and exacerbate the price effects of mergers.
28860.zh_abstract: 我们利用高频数据记录了关于定价技术的新事实，并考察了其对竞争的影响。一些在线零售商采用的技术允许更频繁的价格变动以及对竞争对手价格变动的自动响应。受这些事实的启发，我们构建了一个模型，其中企业可以在定价频率上存在差异，并选择作为竞争对手价格函数的定价算法。在竞争性（马尔可夫完美）均衡中，引入简单的定价算法可能产生价格离散、提高价格水平，并加剧合并对价格的影响。

28859.title: Owning the Agent: Hospital Influence on Physician Behaviors
28859.zh_title: 拥有代理人：医院对医生行为的影响
28859.authors: Haizhen Lin, Ian M. McCarthy, Michael R. Richards, Christopher Whaley
28859.abstract: The organizational structure of U.S. health care markets has changed dramatically in recent years, with nearly half of physicians now employed by hospitals. This trend toward increasing vertical alignment between physicians and hospitals may alter physician behavior relative to physicians remaining in independent or group practices. We examine the effects of such vertical alignment using an instrumental variable strategy and a clinical context facilitating well-defined episodes of care in order to capture effects of integration beyond a single hospital or physician visit. When physicians treat patients at hospitals in which they are integrated, we find increases in total episode spending of around 5%, primarily driven by the administrative substitution of office visits with outpatient visits and associated site-of-care payment differentials. We also estimate a large and statistically significant reduction in overall service counts and claims within an episode, with some evidence of an increase in the intensity of services provided. Ultimately, acquiring hospitals capture more revenue following a physician practice acquisition; yet, the smaller overall bundle of care generates no net savings to Medicare due partly to higher intensity of services as well as site-based payment rules favorable to hospitals.
28859.zh_abstract: 近年来，美国医疗保健市场的组织结构发生了巨大变化，近一半的医生现在受雇于医院。这种医生与医院之间纵向整合的趋势，可能会改变医生相对于仍留在独立或团体诊所中的医生的行为。我们利用工具变量策略和便于定义明确诊疗过程的临床背景，考察了这种纵向整合的影响，以捕捉超出单一医院或医生就诊范围的整合效应。当医生在其所属医院治疗患者时，我们发现整个诊疗过程的总支出增加了约5%，这主要是由门诊就诊替代办公室就诊以及相关的服务地点支付差异所驱动的。我们还估计，在一个诊疗过程中，服务总数和索赔数量出现了大幅且统计上显著的减少，同时有证据表明所提供服务的强度有所增加。最终，在收购医生诊所后，收购医院获得了更多收入；然而，由于服务强度提高以及有利于医院的按服务地点支付规则，较小的整体诊疗包并未为医疗保险带来净节省。

28858.title: Market Size and Research: Evidence from the Pharmaceutical Industry
28858.zh_title: 市场规模与研究：来自制药行业的证据
28858.authors: Dennis Byrski, Fabian Gaessler, Matthew J. Higgins
28858.abstract: Prior literature has established a link between changes in market size and pharmaceutical innovation; whether a link exists with scientific research remains an open question. If upstream research is not responsive to these changes, the kinds of scientific discoveries that flow into future drug development could be disconnected from downstream demand. We explore this question by exploiting the effects of quasi-experimental variation in market size introduced by Medicare Part D. We find no causal relationship between market size and biomedical research in the decade following the implementation of Medicare Part D. While many factors have been shown to motivate scientists to conduct research, this result suggests that changes in market size provide no such incentive. We do find, however, limited support for a response by corporate scientists conducting applied research. Implications for pharmaceutical innovation policy are discussed.
28858.zh_abstract: 已有文献确立了市场规模变化与制药创新之间的联系；但市场规模变化与科学研究之间是否存在联系仍是一个悬而未决的问题。如果上游研究对这些变化不敏感，那么流入未来药物开发的科学发现类型可能与下游需求脱节。我们利用医疗保险D部分引入的市场规模准实验性变化来探讨这个问题。我们发现，在医疗保险D部分实施后的十年内，市场规模与生物医学研究之间不存在因果关系。尽管已有研究表明许多因素可以激励科学家进行研究，但这一结果表明，市场规模的变化并不能提供这种激励。然而，我们确实发现了有限的支持证据，表明从事应用研究的企业科学家对此有所反应。本文讨论了其对制药创新政策的启示。
28858.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：I13, I18, L65, O31, O32

28857.title: When Do Environmental Externalities Have Electoral Consequences? Evidence from Fracking
28857.zh_title: 环境外部性何时会产生选举后果？来自水力压裂法的证据
28857.abstract: The electoral salience of some issues may diminish when one politician has authority over many policy areas. This study measures the role of environmental regulation in concurrent elections for governors and specialized energy regulators in two U.S. states. I first show that while both offices can influence environmental and energy policies, quantitative analysis of campaign news coverage reveals clear differences in the importance of these issues in the two races. Next, I use geologic variation in earthquakes caused by oil and gas production to measure the electoral consequences of a costly environmental externality. There are measurable effects only in the energy regulator race. These results are consistent with theories of issue bundling. Finally, the unbundling effects that I measure appear to be themselves limited by voter attentiveness and partisanship.
28857.zh_abstract: 当一位政治家对多个政策领域拥有权力时，某些问题的选举显著性可能会减弱。本研究衡量了环境监管在美国两个州的州长和专门能源监管机构同时举行的选举中的作用。我首先表明，虽然这两个职位都能影响环境和能源政策，但对竞选新闻报道的定量分析揭示了这些问题在两场竞选中的重要性存在明显差异。接下来，我利用石油和天然气生产引起的地震的地质差异来衡量代价高昂的环境外部性的选举后果。仅在能源监管机构竞选中发现了可测量的影响。这些结果与议题捆绑理论一致。最后，我所测量的去捆绑效应本身似乎受到选民关注度和党派性的限制。

28856.title: Bankrupt Innovative Firms
28856.authors: Song Ma, Joy Tianjiao Tong, Wei Wang
28856.abstract: This paper studies how innovative firms manage their innovation portfolios after filing for Chapter 11 reorganization using three decades of data. We find that they sell off core (i.e., technologically critical and valuable), rather than peripheral, patents in bankruptcy. The selling pattern is driven almost entirely by firms with greater use of secured debt, and the mechanism is secured creditors exercising their control rights on collateralized patents. Creditor-driven patent sales in bankruptcy have implications for technology diffusion—the sold patents diffuse more slowly under new ownership and are more likely to be purchased by patent trolls.
28856.zh_abstract: 本文利用三十年的数据研究了创新型企业在申请第11章重组后如何管理其创新组合。我们发现，它们在破产中出售的是核心（即技术关键且有价值的）专利，而非外围专利。这种出售模式几乎完全由使用更多担保债务的企业驱动，其机制是担保债权人对其抵押专利行使控制权。破产中由债权人驱动的专利出售对技术扩散有影响——出售的专利在新所有权下扩散速度更慢，并且更有可能被专利流氓购买。
28856.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, PR；JEL：G33, O32, O34

28855.title: The Impact of Selection into the Labor Force on the Gender Wage Gap
28855.zh_title: 劳动力市场选择对性别工资差距的影响
28855.authors: Francine D. Blau, Lawrence M. Kahn, Nikolai Boboshko, Matthew L. Comey
28855.abstract: We study the impact of selection bias on estimates of the gender pay gap, focusing on whether the gender pay gap has fallen since 1981. Previous research has found divergent results across techniques, identification strategies, data sets, and time periods. Using Michigan Panel Study of Income Dynamics data and a number of different identification strategies, we find robust evidence that, after controlling for selection, there were large declines in the raw and the unexplained gender wage gaps over the 1981-2015 period. Under our preferred method of accounting for selection, we find that the raw median wage gap declined by 0.378 log points, while the median unexplained gap declined by a more modest but still substantial 0.204 log points. These declines are larger than estimates that do not account for selection. Our results suggest that women’s relative wage offers have increased over this period, even after controlling for their measured covariates, including education and actual labor market experience. However, we note that substantial gender wage gaps remain. In 2015, at the median, the selectivity-corrected gaps were 0.242 log points (raw gap) and 0.206 log points (unexplained gap).
28855.zh_abstract: 我们研究了选择偏差对性别工资差距估计的影响，重点关注自1981年以来性别工资差距是否有所缩小。先前的研究在技术、识别策略、数据集和时间段上得出了不同的结果。利用密歇根收入动态面板研究数据以及多种不同的识别策略，我们发现了稳健的证据表明，在控制选择偏差后，1981年至2015年期间，原始性别工资差距和未解释的性别工资差距均出现了大幅下降。在我们首选的考虑选择偏差的方法下，我们发现原始中位数工资差距下降了0.378个对数点，而中位数未解释差距下降了更温和但仍显著的0.204个对数点。这些下降幅度大于未考虑选择偏差的估计值。我们的结果表明，在此期间，女性的相对工资报价有所增加，即使在控制了包括教育和实际劳动力市场经验在内的测量协变量之后也是如此。然而，我们注意到，显著的性别工资差距仍然存在。2015年，在中位数水平上，经选择校正后的差距为0.242个对数点（原始差距）和0.206个对数点（未解释差距）。
28855.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：C21, C24, J16, J3, J31, J71

28854.title: The Data Privacy Paradox and Digital Demand
28854.zh_title: 数据隐私悖论与数字需求
28854.authors: Long Chen, Yadong Huang, Shumiao Ouyang, Wei Xiong
28854.abstract: A central issue in privacy governance is understanding how users balance their privacy preferences and data sharing to satisfy service demands. We combine survey and behavioral data of a sample of Alipay users to examine how data privacy preferences affect their data sharing with third-party mini-programs on the Alipay platform. We find that there is no relationship between the respondents’ self-stated privacy concerns and their number of data-sharing authorizations, confirming the puzzling data privacy paradox. Instead of attributing this paradox to the respondents’ unreliable survey responses, resignation from active protection of their data privacy, or behavioral factors in making their data-sharing choices, we show that this phenomenon can be explained by a curious finding that users with stronger privacy concerns tend to benefit more from using mini-programs. This positive relationship between privacy concerns and digital demands further suggests that consumers may develop data privacy concerns as a by-product of the process of using digital applications, not because such concerns are innate.
28854.zh_abstract: 隐私治理的一个核心问题是理解用户如何平衡其隐私偏好和数据共享以满足服务需求。我们结合支付宝用户的调查和行为数据，考察数据隐私偏好如何影响他们与支付宝平台上第三方小程序的数据共享。我们发现，受访者自我陈述的隐私担忧与其数据共享授权数量之间没有关系，这证实了令人困惑的数据隐私悖论。我们没有将这一悖论归因于受访者不可靠的调查回答、对主动保护数据隐私的放弃或做出数据共享选择时的行为因素，而是表明这种现象可以通过一个有趣的发现来解释：隐私担忧更强的用户往往从小程序使用中获益更多。隐私担忧与数字需求之间的这种正相关关系进一步表明，消费者可能将数据隐私担忧作为使用数字应用程序过程的副产品而产生，而非因为这种担忧是与生俱来的。
28854.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, ME, PE；JEL：D03, D12, M15

28853.title: Heterogeneity and Aggregate Fluctuations
28853.authors: Minsu Chang, Xiaohong Chen, Frank Schorfheide
28853.abstract: We develop a state-space model with a state-transition equation that takes the form of a functional vector autoregression and stacks macroeconomic aggregates and a cross-sectional density. The measurement equation captures the error in estimating log densities from repeated cross-sectional samples. The log densities and the transition kernels in the law of motion of the states are approximated by sieves, which leads to a finite-dimensional representation in terms of macroeconomic aggregates and sieve coefficents. We use this model to study the joint dynamics of technology shocks, per capita GDP, employment rates, and the earnings distribution. We find that the estimated spillovers between aggregate and distributional dynamics are generally small, a positive technology shock tends to decrease inequality, and a shock that raises the inequality of earnings leads to a small but not significant increase in GDP.
28853.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个状态空间模型，其状态转移方程采用函数向量自回归的形式，并叠加了宏观经济总量和横截面密度。测量方程捕捉了从重复横截面样本估计对数密度时的误差。状态运动规律中的对数密度和转移核通过筛分法近似，这导致了一个以宏观经济总量和筛分系数表示的有限维表示。我们利用该模型研究技术冲击、人均GDP、就业率和收入分配的联合动态。我们发现，估计的总体动态与分配动态之间的溢出效应通常很小，正向技术冲击倾向于降低不平等，而提高收入不平等的冲击会导致GDP小幅但非显著的增加。

28852.title: Beyond Health: Non-Health Risk and the Value of Disability Insurance
28852.zh_title: 超越健康：非健康风险与伤残保险的价值
28852.abstract: The public debate over disability insurance has centered on concerns about individuals without severe health conditions receiving benefits. We go beyond health risk alone to quantify the overall insurance value of U.S. disability programs, including value from insuring non-health risk. We find that disability recipients, especially those with less-severe health conditions, are much more likely to have experienced a wide variety of non-health shocks than non-recipients. Selection into disability receipt on the basis of non-health shocks is so strong among individuals with less-severe health conditions that by many measures less-severe recipients are worse off than more-severe recipients. As a result, under baseline assumptions, benefits to less-severe recipients have an annual surplus value (insurance benefit less efficiency cost) over cost-equivalent tax cuts of $\$7,700$ per recipient, about three-fourths that of benefits to more-severe recipients ($\$9,900$). Insurance against non-health risk accounts for about one-half of the value of U.S. disability programs.
28852.zh_abstract: 关于伤残保险的公共辩论主要集中在没有严重健康状况的个人领取福利的问题上。我们超越单纯的健康风险，量化美国伤残项目的整体保险价值，包括为应对非健康风险提供的保障。我们发现，伤残保险领取者，尤其是那些健康状况不太严重的人，比非领取者更有可能经历各种非健康冲击。在健康状况不太严重的群体中，基于非健康冲击而选择领取伤残保险的现象非常显著，以至于从许多指标来看，健康状况不太严重的领取者比健康状况更严重的领取者处境更差。因此，在基准假设下，向健康状况不太严重的领取者提供的福利，其年度剩余价值（保险收益减去效率成本）相当于等成本减税的每名领取者7700美元，约为向健康状况更严重领取者提供的福利（9900美元）的四分之三。针对非健康风险的保险约占美国伤残项目价值的一半。

28851.title: Foreclosure Spillovers within broad Neighborhoods
28851.zh_title: 广泛社区内的止赎溢出效应
28851.authors: Weiran Huang, Ashlyn Nelson, Stephen Ross
28851.abstract: Most evidence on foreclosure spillovers identifies localized effects that are modest in magnitude, but these effects could multiply to larger aggregate effects across broad neighborhoods. We test this proposition developing a proxy for the fraction of mortgages in negative equity during the foreclosure crisis and estimating a difference-in-differences model for foreclosure. This proxy exploits the timing of foreclosures in each tract, and this within tract variation is not predicted by mortgage attributes, housing attributes or sales prices. Our estimates suggest that 61 percent of the increase in across tract dispersion in foreclosure filings can be explained by these spillover effects.
28851.zh_abstract: 大多数关于止赎溢出效应的证据识别出的局部影响规模适中，但这些效应可能在广泛社区内累积成更大的总体影响。我们通过构建一个在止赎危机期间抵押贷款负资产比例的代理变量，并估计一个针对止赎的双重差分模型来检验这一命题。该代理变量利用了每个普查区止赎发生的时间，而这种普查区内部的变异无法由抵押贷款属性、住房属性或销售价格预测。我们的估计表明，止赎申请在普查区间离散度增加的61%可以由这些溢出效应解释。

28850.title: How Does Social Security Reform Indecision Affect Younger Cohorts?
28850.zh_title: 社会保障改革的不确定性如何影响年轻一代？
28850.authors: John B. Shoven, Sita Slavov, John G. Watson
28850.abstract: The Social Security trust fund will be exhausted in the early 2030s. The U.S. government will need to make a choice about how to address the impending trust fund exhaustion, but it is unclear what it will choose to do. This indecision leaves young and middle-aged workers not knowing whether they will face Social Security benefit cuts, payroll tax increases, or an increase in the full retirement age. This uncertainty about what will happen in the future causes young and middle-aged cohorts who are saving for retirement to make mistakes that could be avoided if the government decided earlier what will happen when the trust fund runs dry. This paper examines the cost of government indecision on Social Security reform. We calculate the value that people in different income classes and different birth cohorts would receive if the government decided now what it will do when the trust funds are exhausted. We find that the cost of indecision can be large. In some cases, the value of knowing today what the policy change will be in 2035 is worth more than two months of labor market earnings.
28850.zh_abstract: 社会保障信托基金将在2030年代初耗尽。美国政府需要就如何应对即将到来的信托基金枯竭做出选择，但目前尚不清楚它将选择何种方案。这种不确定性使得年轻和中年劳动者不知道他们是否会面临社会保障福利削减、工资税增加或全额退休年龄提高。这种关于未来会发生什么的不确定性，导致正在为退休储蓄的年轻和中年一代犯下错误，而这些错误如果政府更早决定信托基金枯竭时的应对措施本可以避免。本文考察了政府在社会保障改革上犹豫不决的成本。我们计算了如果政府现在就决定信托基金耗尽时的应对措施，不同收入阶层和不同出生队列的人将获得的价值。我们发现，犹豫不决的成本可能很大。在某些情况下，今天就知道2035年政策变化的价值超过两个月的劳动力市场收入。

28849.title: The Effect of Social Media on Elections: Evidence from the United States
28849.zh_title: 社交媒体对选举的影响：来自美国的证据
28849.authors: Thomas Fujiwara, Karsten Müller, Carlo Schwarz
28849.abstract: We study how social media affects election outcomes in the United States. We use variation in the number of Twitter users across counties induced by early adopters at the 2007 South by Southwest (SXSW) festival, a key event in Twitter's rise to popularity. We show that this variation is unrelated to observable county characteristics and electoral outcomes before the launch of Twitter. Our results indicate that Twitter lowered the Republican vote share in the 2016 and 2020 presidential elections, but had limited effects on Congress elections and previous presidential elections. Evidence from survey data, primary elections, and a text analysis of millions of tweets suggests that Twitter's relatively liberal content may have persuaded voters with moderate views to vote against Donald Trump.
28849.zh_abstract: 我们研究社交媒体如何影响美国的选举结果。我们利用2007年西南偏南音乐节上早期采用者导致的各县Twitter用户数量差异，这是Twitter流行起来的关键事件。我们表明，这种差异与Twitter推出前的可观察县特征和选举结果无关。我们的结果表明，Twitter降低了2016年和2020年总统选举中共和党的得票率，但对国会选举和之前的总统选举影响有限。来自调查数据、初选以及对数百万条推文进行文本分析的证据表明，Twitter相对自由的内容可能说服了持温和观点的选民投票反对唐纳德·特朗普。

28899.title: Sustainability in a Risky World
28899.zh_title: 风险世界中的可持续性
28899.abstract: How much consumption is sustainable, if \\sustainability" requires that welfare should not be expected to decline over time? We impose a sustainability constraint on a standard consumption/portfolio choice problem. The constraint does not distort port- folio choice, but it imposes an upper bound on the sustainable consumption-wealth ratio, which must lie between the riskless interest rate and the expected return on wealth (and if risky capital evolves according to a geometric Brownian motion, it lies exactly halfway between the two). Sustainability requires an upward drift in wealth and consumption to compensate future generations for the increased risk they face.
28899.zh_abstract: 如果“可持续性”要求福利不应预期随时间下降，那么多少消费是可持续的？我们在标准的消费/投资组合选择问题上施加了可持续性约束。该约束不会扭曲投资组合选择，但它对可持续的消费-财富比率施加了一个上限，该比率必须介于无风险利率和财富预期回报率之间（如果风险资本遵循几何布朗运动，则恰好位于两者中间）。可持续性要求财富和消费向上漂移，以补偿后代面临的更高风险。

28898.title: Modeling Behavior during a Pandemic: Using HIV as an Historical Analogy
28898.zh_title: 大流行期间的行为建模：以艾滋病作为历史类比
28898.abstract: Many models from epidemiology are not designed to capture tradeoffs between health and economic well-being and few are equipped to predict how these tradeoffs interact with individuals’ preferences to influence behavior. Policies based on such models may not reflect societal preferences or capture how preferences affect behavior and disease spread. Models with epidemiological processes that do incorporate behavior change or health-wealth tradeoffs (mostly from economics) drastically limit individual-level heterogeneity to remain tractable. This makes it difficult to understand variation in behavioral responses and distributional consequences of the pandemic, which should be central to any evaluation of pandemic-related policy. Without the proper tools, we are unable to fully address even basic policy questions, such as whether the long-run effects of social-distancing justify the costs - and if so, for whom and under what circumstances. After reviewing modeling approaches from epidemiology and economics (among other fields), I propose a framework adapted from earlier work on the HIV/AIDS epidemic. Analysis of individual behavior is based on the idea that health is a form of human capital in which individuals invest through their choices. The model integrates individual level variation that other frameworks omit, but does so at the cost of drastically limiting aggregate economic and epidemiological processes. I conclude that what is needed is a multi-disciplinary effort that helps to bridge gaps across disciplines, which would amount to constructing models that capture key features of different approaches. To be useful in evaluating pandemic-related policy, such a model should have rich heterogeneity and capture how individual choices are linked to the broad contours of disease spread and aggregate economic output. Whether such an effort would be feasible and fruitful remains to be seen.
28898.zh_abstract: 许多流行病学模型并非旨在捕捉健康与经济福祉之间的权衡，也很少有模型能够预测这些权衡如何与个人偏好相互作用以影响行为。基于此类模型的政策可能无法反映社会偏好，也无法捕捉偏好如何影响行为和疾病传播。那些确实包含行为变化或健康-财富权衡的流行病学过程模型（主要来自经济学）为了保持可处理性而大幅限制了个人层面的异质性。这使得难以理解行为反应的变异性和大流行的分配后果，而这应成为任何大流行相关政策评估的核心。没有适当的工具，我们甚至无法充分解决基本的政策问题，例如社交距离的长期效应是否证明其成本是合理的——如果是，对谁以及在什么情况下合理。在回顾了流行病学和经济学（以及其他领域）的建模方法后，我提出了一个改编自早期关于艾滋病毒/艾滋病流行病工作的框架。对个体行为的分析基于健康是一种人力资本形式的理念，个人通过其选择进行投资。该模型整合了其他框架忽略的个人层面变异，但代价是大幅限制了总体经济和流行病学过程。我的结论是，需要多学科努力来弥合学科间的差距，这相当于构建能够捕捉不同方法关键特征的模型。为了在评估大流行相关政策时有用，这样的模型应具有丰富的异质性，并捕捉个人选择如何与疾病传播的广泛轮廓和总体经济产出相联系。这种努力是否可行且富有成效仍有待观察。
28898.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：I12, I14, I18, I24, J20

28897.title: Delay the Pension Age or Adjust the Pension Benefit? Implications for Labor Supply and Individual Welfare in China
28897.zh_title: 延迟退休年龄还是调整养老金待遇？对中国劳动供给和个人福利的影响
28897.authors: Yuanyuan Deng, Hanming Fang, Katja Hanewald, Shang Wu
28897.abstract: We develop and calibrate a life-cycle model of labor supply and consumption to quantify the implications of alternative pension reforms on labor supply, individual welfare, and government budget for China’s basic old-age insurance program. We focus on urban males and distinguish low-skilled and high-skilled individuals, who differ in their preferences, health and labor income dynamics, and medical expense processes. We use the calibrated model to evaluate three potential pension reforms: (i) increasing the pension eligibility age from 60 to 65, but keeping the current pension benefit rule unchanged; (ii) keeping the pension eligibility age at 60, but proportionally lowering pension benefits so that the pension program’s budget is the same as under Reform (i); and (iii) increasing the pension eligibility age to 65 and simultaneously increasing the pension benefits so that individuals of both skill types attain the same individual welfare levels as in the status quo. We find that relative to the baseline, both Reforms (i) and (ii) can substantially improve the budgets of the pension system, but at the cost of substantial individual welfare loss for both skill types. In contrast, we find that Reform (iii) can modestly improve the budget of the pension system while ensuring that both skill types are as well off as in the status quo. We find that Reforms (i) and (ii) slightly increases, but Reform (iii) slightly decreases, the overall labor supply.
28897.zh_abstract: 我们开发并校准了一个劳动供给和消费的生命周期模型，以量化替代性养老金改革对中国基本养老保险计划的劳动供给、个人福利和政府预算的影响。我们关注城市男性，并区分低技能和高技能个体，他们在偏好、健康和劳动收入动态以及医疗支出过程上存在差异。我们使用校准后的模型评估三种潜在的养老金改革：（i）将养老金领取年龄从60岁提高到65岁，但保持当前养老金待遇规则不变；（ii）保持养老金领取年龄为60岁，但按比例降低养老金待遇，使养老金计划的预算与改革（i）相同；（iii）将养老金领取年龄提高到65岁，同时提高养老金待遇，使两种技能类型的个人都达到与现状相同的个人福利水平。我们发现，相对于基准，改革（i）和（ii）都能显著改善养老金系统的预算，但代价是两种技能类型的个人福利大幅损失。相比之下，我们发现改革（iii）可以适度改善养老金系统的预算，同时确保两种技能类型的个人福利与现状相同。我们发现，改革（i）和（ii）略微增加了总体劳动供给，而改革（iii）则略微减少了总体劳动供给。

28896.title: Labor Dynamics and Supply Chain Disruption in Food Manufacturing
28896.zh_title: 食品制造业中的劳动力动态与供应链中断
28896.authors: A. Ford Ramsey, Barry Goodwin, Mildred Haley
28896.abstract: Food manufacturing and processing is an important link between agricultural producers and consumers in the agricultural supply chain. The food manufacturing sector in the United States is both increasingly mechanized and increasingly concentrated. Consequently, labor risks in food manufacturing have changed over time with changes in industry structure. Labor risks were highlighted by the COVID-19 pandemic - particularly in the animal slaughtering and processing industry - where labor-driven disruptions resulted in temporary plant closures. We use county-level data on employment in food manufacturing and dynamic panel models estimated via generalized method of moments to examine employment and wage dynamics in the food manufacturing sector and animal processing industry. We then compare forecasts from the estimated models with changes in food manufacturing and animal processing employment and wages during the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. Our results provide insight into the role of operational and disruption risks in food manufacturing. We find significant delays in adjustment to employment and quicker adjustment in wages. Although there is an unanticipated drop in employment in food manufacturing and animal processing in April of 2020, employment returned to predicted levels within two to three months. The response of wages and employment to the COVID-19 pandemic suggest a degree of resilience in food supply chains.
28896.zh_abstract: 食品制造和加工是农业供应链中连接农业生产者和消费者的重要环节。美国的食品制造业既日益机械化，也日益集中。因此，食品制造业中的劳动力风险随着行业结构的变化而随时间改变。COVID-19大流行凸显了劳动力风险——特别是在动物屠宰和加工行业——其中劳动力驱动的中断导致工厂暂时关闭。我们使用县级食品制造业就业数据以及通过广义矩估计法估计的动态面板模型，来考察食品制造业和动物加工业的就业与工资动态。然后，我们将估计模型的预测与COVID-19大流行初期食品制造业和动物加工业就业与工资的变化进行比较。我们的结果提供了对食品制造业运营风险和中断风险作用的见解。我们发现就业调整存在显著延迟，而工资调整更快。尽管2020年4月食品制造业和动物加工业的就业出现了意外下降，但就业在两到三个月内恢复到了预测水平。工资和就业对COVID-19大流行的反应表明食品供应链具有一定程度的韧性。

28895.title: Learning about Housing Cost: Survey Evidence from the German House Price Boom
28895.zh_title: 学习住房成本：来自德国房价繁荣期的调查证据
28895.authors: Fabian Kindermann, Julia Le Blanc, Monika Piazzesi, Martin Schneider
28895.abstract: This paper uses new household survey data to study expectation formation during the recent housing boom in Germany. The cross section of forecasts depends on only two household characteristics: location and tenure. The average household in a region responds to local conditions but underpredicts local price growth. Renters make on average higher and hence more accurate forecasts than owners, although their forecasts are more dispersed and their mean squared forecast errors are higher. A quantitative model of learning about housing cost can match these facts. It emphasizes the unique information structure of housing among asset markets: renters who do not own the asset are relatively well informed about its cash flow, since they pay for housing services that owners simply consume. Renters then make more accurate forecasts in a boom driven by an increase in rents and recovery from a financial crisis.
28895.zh_abstract: 本文利用新的家庭调查数据，研究德国近期住房繁荣期间的预期形成。预测的横截面仅取决于两个家庭特征：地理位置和住房所有权。一个地区的普通家庭会对当地状况做出反应，但会低估当地房价增长。租房者平均而言比房主做出更高、因而更准确的预测，尽管他们的预测更为分散，且均方预测误差更高。一个关于住房成本学习的定量模型可以匹配这些事实。该模型强调了住房在资产市场中独特的信息结构：不拥有该资产的租房者对其现金流相对更了解，因为他们为房主直接消费的住房服务付费。因此，在由租金上涨和金融危机复苏驱动的繁荣中，租房者能做出更准确的预测。

28894.title: Judging Under Public Pressure
28894.zh_title: 在公众压力下进行裁决
28894.authors: Alma Cohen, Zvika Neeman, Florian Auferoth
28894.abstract: Individuals who engage in “judging” – that is, rendering a determination in a dispute or contest between two parties – might be influenced by public pressure to favor one of the parties. Many rules and arrangements seek to insulate such individuals from public pressure or to address the effects of such pressure. We study this subject empirically, investigating the circumstances in which public pressure is more and less likely to affect judging.
28894.zh_abstract: 从事“裁决”（即在双方之间的争端或竞赛中做出决定）的个人可能会受到公众压力的影响，从而偏袒其中一方。许多规则和安排旨在使此类个人免受公众压力影响，或应对这种压力的后果。我们对此主题进行实证研究，探究公众压力更可能或更不可能影响裁决的具体情境。

28893.title: Politics and Gender in the Executive Suite
28893.zh_title: 高管层的政治倾向与性别
28893.authors: Alma Cohen, Moshe Hazan, David Weiss
28893.abstract: Are the political preferences of CEOs associated with the representation and compensation of women in the executive suite? We find that Democratic CEOs (those who contribute more to Democratic candidates) are associated with higher representation of women in the executive suite. To explore causality, we use an event study approach and show that replacing a Republican with a Democratic CEO is associated with 20%-60% in more women in the executive suite. Finally, we show that Democratic CEOs associated with a significant reduction (or even disappearance) of the gender gap in the level and performance-sensitivity of executive pay.
28893.zh_abstract: CEO的政治偏好是否与高管层中女性的代表性和薪酬相关？我们发现，民主党CEO（那些向民主党候选人捐款更多的人）与高管层中女性比例更高相关。为探究因果关系，我们采用事件研究法，表明将共和党CEO替换为民主党CEO后，高管层中女性比例增加20%-60%。最后，我们证明民主党CEO与高管薪酬水平和绩效敏感度方面的性别差距显著缩小（甚至消失）相关。
28893.meta: Programs：CF, LE, POL；JEL：G30, J16, J30, M12, M14, M51

28892.title: Global Banks and Systemic Debt Crises
28892.zh_title: 全球银行与系统性债务危机
28892.authors: Juan M. Morelli, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
28892.abstract: We study the role of global financial intermediaries in international lending. We construct a model of the world economy, in which heterogeneous borrowers issue risky securities purchased by financial intermediaries. Aggregate shocks transmit internationally through financial intermediaries' net worth. The strength of this transmission is governed by the degree of frictions intermediaries face in financing their risky investments. We provide direct empirical evidence on this mechanism showing that around Lehman Brothers' collapse, emerging-market bonds held by more distressed global banks experienced larger price contractions. A quantitative analysis of the model shows that global financial intermediaries play a relevant role in driving borrowing-cost and consumption fluctuations in emerging-market economies, during both debt crises and regular business cycles. The portfolio of financial intermediaries and the distribution of bond holdings in the world economy are key to determine aggregate dynamics.
28892.zh_abstract: 我们研究全球金融中介在国际借贷中的作用。我们构建了一个世界经济模型，其中异质性借款人发行由金融中介购买的风险证券。总冲击通过金融中介的净值在国际间传导。这种传导的强度取决于中介在为其风险投资融资时所面临的摩擦程度。我们提供了关于这一机制的直接经验证据，表明在雷曼兄弟倒闭前后，由陷入困境的全球银行持有的新兴市场债券经历了更大的价格下跌。模型的定量分析表明，在债务危机和常规商业周期中，全球金融中介在推动新兴市场经济体的借贷成本波动和消费波动方面发挥着重要作用。金融中介的投资组合以及世界经济中债券持有量的分布是决定总体动态的关键因素。
28892.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E3, F3, F41

28891.title: On the Green Interest Rate.
28891.abstract: This paper demonstrates how a central bank might operationalize an expanded role inclusive of managing risks from environmental pollution. The analysis introduces the green interest rate (rg) which depends on temporal changes in the pollution intensity of output. This policy instrument reallocates consumption from periods when output is pollution intensive to when output is cleaner. In economies on a cleaning-up path, rg exceeds r*. For those growing more polluted, rg is less than r*. In the U.S. economy from 1957 to 2016, rg exceeded r* by 50 basis points. Federal environmental policy reversed the orientation between rg and r*.
28891.zh_abstract: 本文展示了中央银行如何将包括管理环境污染风险在内的扩展角色付诸实践。分析引入了绿色利率（rg），该利率取决于产出污染强度的时序变化。这一政策工具将消费从产出污染密集的时期重新分配到产出更清洁的时期。在处于清洁化路径的经济体中，rg超过r*。对于污染日益严重的经济体，rg低于r*。在1957年至2016年的美国经济中，rg比r*高出50个基点。联邦环境政策逆转了rg与r*之间的取向关系。
28891.meta: Programs：EEE, ME；JEL：E21, E43, E63, Q51, Q53, Q54, Q56, Q58

28890.title: Missing Top Income Recipients
28890.abstract: Low response rates among rich households are thought to be a serious problem in many applications using household surveys. The paper discusses the various ways the problem can be dealt with, and makes some recommendations for practice, including in developing countries. Under certain conditions, income-selective non-compliance with an initially randomized assignment can be corrected by reweighting the data. This requires that the surveys pick up at least some top incomes. If not, then income tax records can help, including in estimating distributional national accounts. However, tax data come with their own concerns including tax avoidance/evasion, weak coverage of informal sectors and illicit incomes, and concerns about construct validity, given the limitations of taxable income as a basis for inter-personal comparisons of economic welfare. An appropriately weighted survey-based distribution of an acceptable measure of economic welfare need not be less reliable for most purposes of distributional analysis than income-tax records, including in combination with surveys. The choice will depend on the question to be addressed, and country-specific circumstances. These measurement issues warrant further research across multiple settings.
28890.zh_abstract: 在许多使用家庭调查的应用中，富裕家庭的低回复率被认为是一个严重问题。本文讨论了处理该问题的各种方法，并为实践（包括在发展中国家）提出了一些建议。在某些条件下，可以通过对数据进行重新加权来纠正最初随机分配中因收入选择导致的违规行为。这要求调查至少能捕捉到部分高收入人群。如果无法做到，那么所得税记录可以提供帮助，包括用于估算分配国民账户。然而，税收数据本身也存在问题，包括避税/逃税、对非正规部门和非法收入的覆盖不足，以及由于应税收入作为人际经济福利比较基础的局限性而带来的构念效度问题。对于大多数分配分析目的而言，经过适当加权的、基于调查的可接受经济福利指标分布，其可靠性不一定低于所得税记录（包括与调查结合使用的情况）。选择将取决于要解决的问题以及各国的具体情况。这些测量问题值得在多种情境下进行进一步研究。

28889.title: The Market-Expanding Role of Regulatory Approval in Medicine
28889.zh_title: 药品监管批准的市场扩张作用
28889.authors: Benjamin Berger, Amitabh Chandra, Craig Garthwaite
28889.abstract: Regulatory review is often seen as a barrier to innovation, increasing costs and delaying new medicines. Yet approval may also expand markets by certifying quality and reducing uncertainty. We test this by studying FDA approval for follow-on indications—uses that physicians could already prescribe “off-label”—and find approval raises use in newly approved diseases by 25 percent within a year, with larger increases in smaller off-label markets. Subsequent approvals in the same disease yield smaller gains. Our results suggest regulatory approval of medicines expands market size by increasing demand, rather than easing insurer-imposed restrictions, revealing limits to market-based learning.
28889.zh_abstract: 监管审查通常被视为创新的障碍，会增加成本并延迟新药上市。然而，批准也可能通过认证质量和减少不确定性来扩张市场。我们通过研究FDA对后续适应症（即医生已经可以“超说明书”使用的用途）的批准来检验这一点，发现批准后一年内，新获批疾病的使用量增加了25%，在较小的超说明书市场中增幅更大。同一疾病后续的批准带来的收益较小。我们的结果表明，药品监管批准通过增加需求（而非放松保险公司施加的限制）来扩大市场规模，揭示了基于市场学习的局限性。
28889.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：I1, I18, O3

28888.title: Supply, Demand, and Specialized Production
28888.zh_title: 供给、需求与专业化生产
28888.abstract: This paper develops a growth model characterized by equilibrium unemployment and sustained monopoly power. The level of demand is a key factor in deviations from the steady-state growth path with a Keynesian-type spending multiplier despite the absence of any nominal rigidities. The key friction in the model is the technological requirement that production of certain goods requires a dedicated team of workers that takes time to train and assemble.
28888.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个以均衡失业和持续垄断势力为特征的增长模型。尽管不存在任何名义刚性，需求水平仍是偏离稳态增长路径的关键因素，并存在凯恩斯式的支出乘数。模型中的关键摩擦是技术性要求：某些商品的生产需要一支专门的工人团队，而组建和培训该团队需要时间。

28887.title: Information Cascades and Social Learning
28887.authors: Sushil Bikhchandani, David Hirshleifer, Omer Tamuz, Ivo Welch
28887.abstract: Social learning is the updating of beliefs based on the observation of others. It can lead to efficient aggregation of information, but also to inaccurate decisions, fragility of mass behaviors, and, in the case of information cascades, to complete blockage of learning. We review the theory of information cascades and social learning, and discuss important themes, insights and applications of this literature as it has developed over the last thirty years. We also highlight open questions and promising directions for further theoretical and empirical exploration.
28887.zh_abstract: 社会学习是指基于观察他人行为来更新自身信念的过程。它既能促进信息的有效聚合，也可能导致决策失误、群体行为的脆弱性，以及在信息级联情况下学习的完全停滞。本文回顾了信息级联与社会学习的理论，并讨论了该文献在过去三十年间发展出的重要主题、洞见与应用。我们还指出了开放性问题以及未来理论与实证探索的有前景方向。
28887.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D7, D8, D9

28886.title: Synthetic Controls with Staggered Adoption
28886.zh_title: 交错采纳情境下的合成控制法
28886.authors: Eli Ben-Michael, Avi Feller, Jesse Rothstein
28886.abstract: Staggered adoption of policies by different units at different times creates promising opportunities for observational causal inference. Estimation remains challenging, however, and common regression methods can give misleading results. A promising alternative is the synthetic control method (SCM), which finds a weighted average of control units that closely balances the treated unit’s pre-treatment outcomes. In this paper, we generalize SCM, originally designed to study a single treated unit, to the staggered adoption setting. We first bound the error for the average effect and show that it depends on both the imbalance for each treated unit separately and the imbalance for the average of the treated units. We then propose "partially pooled" SCM weights to minimize a weighted combination of these measures; approaches that focus only on balancing one of the two components can lead to bias. We extend this approach to incorporate unit-level intercept shifts and auxiliary covariates. We assess the performance of the proposed method via extensive simulations and apply our results to the question of whether teacher collective bargaining leads to higher school spending, finding minimal impacts. We implement the proposed method in the augsynth R package.
28886.zh_abstract: 不同单位在不同时间交错采纳政策，为观察性因果推断创造了有前景的机会。然而，估计仍然具有挑战性，常见的回归方法可能得出误导性结果。一个有前景的替代方法是合成控制法（SCM），它通过寻找控制单位的加权平均，尽可能紧密地平衡处理单位在干预前的结果变量。在本文中，我们将最初为研究单一处理单位而设计的SCM推广到交错采纳情境。我们首先界定了平均处理效应的误差，并表明该误差既取决于每个处理单位单独的失衡程度，也取决于处理单位平均值的失衡程度。然后，我们提出了“部分池化”的SCM权重，以最小化这两个指标的加权组合；仅关注平衡其中某一成分的方法可能导致偏差。我们将该方法扩展到纳入单位层面的截距偏移和辅助协变量。我们通过广泛的模拟评估了所提出方法的性能，并将结果应用于教师集体谈判是否导致更高学校支出这一问题，发现影响极小。我们在augsynth R包中实现了所提出的方法。
28886.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C23, I21, J5

28885.title: The Augmented Synthetic Control Method
28885.authors: Eli Ben-Michael, Avi Feller, Jesse Rothstein
28885.abstract: The synthetic control method (SCM) is a popular approach for estimating the impact of a treatment on a single unit in panel data settings. The "synthetic control" is a weighted average of control units that balances the treated unit's pre-treatment outcomes and other covariates as closely as possible. A critical feature of the original proposal is to use SCM only when the fit on pre-treatment outcomes is excellent. We propose Augmented SCM as an extension of SCM to settings where such pre-treatment fit is infeasible. Analogous to bias correction for inexact matching, Augmented SCM uses an outcome model to estimate the bias due to imperfect pre-treatment fit and then de-biases the original SCM estimate. Our main proposal, which uses ridge regression as the outcome model, directly controls pre-treatment fit while minimizing extrapolation from the convex hull. This estimator can also be expressed as a solution to a modified synthetic controls problem that allows negative weights on some donor units. We bound the estimation error of this approach under different data generating processes, including a linear factor model, and show how regularization helps to avoid over-fitting to noise. We demonstrate gains from Augmented SCM with extensive simulation studies and apply this framework to estimate the impact of the 2012 Kansas tax cuts on economic growth. We implement the proposed method in the new augsynth R package.
28885.zh_abstract: 合成控制法（SCM）是一种在面板数据情境下估计单一处理单位处理效应的流行方法。“合成控制”是控制单位的加权平均，它尽可能紧密地平衡处理单位在干预前的结果变量和其他协变量。原始方法的一个关键特征是仅在干预前结果拟合良好时使用SCM。我们提出增强型SCM作为SCM在干预前拟合不可行情境下的扩展。类似于对不精确匹配的偏差校正，增强型SCM使用一个结果模型来估计因干预前拟合不完美导致的偏差，然后对原始SCM估计进行去偏。我们的主要提议使用岭回归作为结果模型，在最小化凸包外推的同时直接控制干预前拟合。该估计量也可以表示为修改后的合成控制问题的解，该问题允许某些供体单位具有负权重。我们在不同数据生成过程（包括线性因子模型）下界定了该方法的估计误差，并展示了正则化如何有助于避免对噪声的过拟合。我们通过广泛的模拟研究展示了增强型SCM的改进，并将该框架应用于估计2012年堪萨斯州减税对经济增长的影响。我们在新的augsynth R包中实现了所提出的方法。
28885.meta: Programs：LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C23, E62, H71

28884.title: A Model of Online Misinformation
28884.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
28884.abstract: We present a model of online content sharing where agents sequentially observe an article and must decide whether to share it with others. This content may or may not contain misinformation. Agents gain utility from positive social media interactions but do not want to be called out for propagating misinformation. We characterize the (Bayesian-Nash) equilibria of this social media game and show sharing exhibits strategic complementarity. Our first main result establishes that the impact of homophily on content virality is non-monotone: homophily reduces the broader circulation of an article, but it creates echo chambers that impose less discipline on the sharing of low-reliability content. This insight underpins our second main result, which demonstrates that social media platforms interested in maximizing engagement tend to design their algorithms to create more homophilic communication patterns (“filter bubbles”). We show that platform incentives to amplify misinformation are particularly pronounced for low-reliability content likely to contain misinformation and when there is greater polarization and more divisive content. Finally, we discuss various regulatory solutions to such platform-manufactured misinformation.
28884.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个在线内容分享模型，其中主体依次观察一篇文章，并必须决定是否与他人分享。这些内容可能包含也可能不包含错误信息。主体从积极的社交媒体互动中获得效用，但不想因传播错误信息而被指责。我们刻画了该社交媒体博弈的（贝叶斯-纳什）均衡，并表明分享行为表现出策略互补性。我们的第一个主要结果确立了同质性对内容病毒式传播的影响是非单调的：同质性减少了文章的广泛传播，但它创造了回音室，对低可靠性内容的分享施加了较少的约束。这一洞见支撑了我们的第二个主要结果，该结果表明，追求参与度最大化的社交媒体平台倾向于设计其算法，以创造更具同质性的沟通模式（“过滤气泡”）。我们表明，平台放大错误信息的激励在以下情况下尤为显著：对于可能包含错误信息的低可靠性内容，以及当存在更大的两极分化和更具分裂性的内容时。最后，我们讨论了针对这种平台制造的错误信息的各种监管解决方案。

28883.title: Marriage Market and Labor Market Sorting
28883.zh_title: 婚姻市场与劳动力市场匹配
28883.authors: Paula A. Calvo, Ilse Lindenlaub, Ana Reynoso
28883.abstract: We develop a new equilibrium model in which households’ labor supply choices form the link between sorting on the marriage market and sorting on the labor market. We first show that in theory, the nature of home production—whether partners’ hours are complements or substitutes—shapes equilibrium labor supply as well as marriage and labor market sorting. We then estimate our model using German data to empirically assess the nature of home production, and find that spouses’ home hours are complements. We investigate to what extent complementarity in home hours drives sorting and inequality. We find that home production complementarity strengthens positive marriage sorting and reduces the gender gap in hours and in labor sorting. This puts significant downward pressure on the gender wage gap and on within-household income inequality, but fuels between-household inequality. Our estimated model sheds new light on the sources of inequality in today’s Germany, and—by identifying important shifts in home production technology toward more complementarity—on the evolution of inequality over time.
28883.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个新的均衡模型，其中家庭的劳动供给选择构成了婚姻市场匹配与劳动力市场匹配之间的联系。我们首先从理论上表明，家庭生产的性质——即配偶的工作时间是互补品还是替代品——塑造了均衡劳动供给以及婚姻和劳动力市场匹配。然后，我们使用德国数据估计我们的模型，以实证评估家庭生产的性质，并发现配偶的家庭工作时间是互补的。我们研究了家庭工作时间互补性在多大程度上驱动了匹配和不平等。我们发现，家庭生产互补性加强了正向婚姻匹配，并缩小了工作时间与劳动匹配方面的性别差距。这给性别工资差距和家庭内部收入不平等带来了显著的下行压力，但加剧了家庭间的不平等。我们估计的模型为当今德国不平等的根源提供了新的见解，并且——通过识别家庭生产技术向更高互补性的重要转变——为不平等随时间的演变提供了新的见解。
28883.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D1, J01, J12, J16, J24, J31

28882.title: Sampling Bias in Entrepreneurial Experiments
28882.zh_title: 创业实验中的抽样偏差
28882.authors: Ruiqing Cao, Rembrand M. Koning, Ramana Nanda
28882.abstract: Using data from a prominent online platform for launching new digital products, we document that ‘sampling bias’—defined as the difference between a startup’s target customer base and the actual sample on which early ‘beta tests’ are conducted—has a systematic and persistent impact on the venture’s success. Specifically, we show that products with a female-focused target market launching on a typical day, when nine in ten users on this platform are men, experience 45% less growth a year after launch than those for whom the target market is more male-focused. By isolating exogenous variation in the composition of beta testers unrelated to the characteristics of launched products on that day, we find that on days when there are unexpectedly more women beta testers on the platform—reducing the amount of sampling bias for female-focused products—the gender-performance gap shrinks towards zero. Our results highlight how sampling bias can lead to fewer successfully commercialized innovations for consumers who are underrepresented among early users.
28882.zh_abstract: 利用一个著名的数字新产品发布在线平台的数据，我们记录了“抽样偏差”——定义为初创企业的目标客户群与实际进行早期“测试版测试”的样本之间的差异——对企业的成功具有系统性和持续性的影响。具体来说，我们表明，在典型的一天（该平台上十分之九的用户是男性）推出以女性为目标市场的产品，一年后的增长比那些目标市场更偏向男性的产品少45%。通过隔离与当天推出产品特征无关的测试版测试者构成的外生变化，我们发现，当平台上女性测试版测试者意外增多（从而减少了女性聚焦产品的抽样偏差量）时，性别-绩效差距缩小至接近零。我们的结果强调了抽样偏差如何导致在早期用户中代表性不足的消费者的创新成功商业化减少。

28881.title: Determinacy without the Taylor Principle
28881.abstract: Our understanding of monetary policy is complicated by an equilibrium-selection conundrum: because the same path for the nominal interest rate can be associated with multiple equilibrium paths for inflation and output, there is a long-standing debate about what the right equilibrium selection is. We offer a potential resolution by showing that small frictions in social memory and intertemporal coordination can remove the indeterminacy. Under our perturbations, the unique surviving equilibrium is the same as that selected by the Taylor principle, but it no more relies on it; monetary policy is left to play only a stabilization role; and fiscal policy needs to be Ricardian, even when monetary policy is passive.
28881.zh_abstract: 我们对货币政策的理解因一个均衡选择难题而变得复杂：由于名义利率的同一路径可能与通胀和产出的多条均衡路径相关联，因此关于什么是正确的均衡选择存在长期争论。我们通过表明社会记忆和跨期协调中的微小摩擦可以消除不确定性，提供了一个潜在的解决方案。在我们的扰动下，唯一存活的均衡与泰勒原理所选择的均衡相同，但它不再依赖于泰勒原理；货币政策仅发挥稳定作用；财政政策需要是李嘉图式的，即使货币政策是被动的。

28880.title: (When) Does Patent Protection Spur Cumulative Research Within Firms?
28880.zh_title: 专利保护何时（以及是否）促进企业内部累积性研究？
28880.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Matt Marx, Dror Shvadron
28880.abstract: We estimate the effect of patent protection on follow-on investments in corporate scientific research. We exploit a new method for identifying an exogenous reduction in the protection a granted patent provides. Using data on public, research-active firms between 1990 and 2015, we find that firms decrease follow-on research after a reduction in patent protection, as measured by a drop in internal citations to an associated scientific article. This effect is stronger for smaller firms and in industries where patents are traded less frequently. Our findings are consistent with a stylized model whereby patent protection is a strategic substitute for commercialization capability. Our results imply that stronger patents encourage follow-on research, but also shift the locus of research from big firms toward smaller firms and startups. As patent protection has strengthened since the mid-1980s, our results help explain why the American innovation ecosystem has undergone a growing division of innovative labor, where startups become primary sources of new ideas.
28880.zh_abstract: 我们估计了专利保护对企业科学研究后续投资的影响。我们利用一种新方法来识别已授权专利保护的外生减少。利用1990年至2015年间活跃于研究的上市公司的数据，我们发现，在专利保护减少后（以对相关科学文章的内部引用量下降来衡量），企业会减少后续研究。这种效应对于规模较小的企业以及专利交易频率较低的行业更为显著。我们的发现与一个简约模型一致，该模型认为专利保护是商业化能力的策略替代品。我们的结果表明，更强的专利保护鼓励了后续研究，但也将研究重心从大企业转向较小的企业和初创企业。自20世纪80年代中期以来，随着专利保护的加强，我们的结果有助于解释为什么美国创新生态系统经历了日益增长的创新劳动分工，其中初创企业成为新想法的主要来源。

28879.title: Prudential Policy with Distorted Beliefs
28879.zh_title: 信念扭曲下的审慎政策
28879.abstract: This paper studies leverage regulation and monetary policy when equity investors and/or creditors have distorted beliefs relative to a planner. We characterize how the optimal leverage regulation responds to arbitrary changes in investors' and creditors' beliefs and relate our results to practical scenarios. We show that the optimal regulation depends on the type and magnitude of such changes. Optimism by investors calls for looser leverage regulation, while optimism by creditors, or jointly by both investors and creditors, calls for tighter leverage regulation. Monetary policy should be tightened (loosened) in response to either investors' or creditors' optimism (pessimism).
28879.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当股权投资者和/或债权人相对于规划者存在扭曲信念时，杠杆监管与货币政策的最优设计。我们刻画了最优杠杆监管如何响应投资者与债权人信念的任意变化，并将结果与实际情景相联系。研究表明，最优监管取决于此类变化的类型与幅度。投资者乐观情绪要求放松杠杆监管，而债权人乐观情绪或投资者与债权人共同乐观则要求收紧杠杆监管。货币政策应针对投资者或债权人的乐观（悲观）情绪相应收紧（放松）。
28879.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E52, E61, G21, G28

28878.title: Platform as a Rule-Maker: Evidence from Airbnb's Cancellation Policies
28878.zh_title: 平台作为规则制定者：来自爱彼迎取消政策的证据
28878.authors: Jian Jia, Ginger Zhe Jin, Liad Wagman
28878.abstract: Digital platforms are not only match-making intermediaries but also establish internal rules that govern all users in their ecosystems. To better understand the governing role of platforms, we study two Airbnb pro-guest rules that pertain to guest and host cancellations, using data on Airbnb and VRBO listings in 10 US cities. We demonstrate that such pro-guest rules can drive demand and supply to and from the platform, as a function of the local platform competition between Airbnb and VRBO. Our results suggest that platform competition sometimes dampens a platform wide pro-guest rule and sometimes reinforces it, often with heterogeneous effects on different hosts. This implies that platform competition does not necessarily mitigate a platform's incentive to treat the two sides asymmetrically, and any public policy in platform competition must consider its implication on all sides.
28878.zh_abstract: 数字平台不仅是撮合交易的中介，还建立内部规则来管理其生态系统中的所有用户。为更深入理解平台的治理角色，我们利用美国10个城市中爱彼迎和VRBO房源数据，研究了爱彼迎两项针对客人的规则，分别涉及客人和房东的取消行为。我们证明，此类亲客规则能够根据爱彼迎与VRBO之间的本地平台竞争情况，驱动需求与供给进出平台。结果表明，平台竞争有时会削弱平台层面的亲客规则，有时则会强化它，且对不同房东往往产生异质性影响。这意味着平台竞争未必能缓解平台对双边用户区别对待的动机，任何针对平台竞争的公共政策都必须考虑其对所有各方的影响。

28877.title: Employed in a SNAP? The Impact of Work Requirements on Program Participation and Labor Supply
28877.zh_title: 在SNAP中就业？工作要求对项目参与和劳动供给的影响
28877.authors: Colin Gray, Adam Leive, Elena Prager, Kelsey B. Pukelis, Mary Zaki
28877.abstract: Work requirements are common in U.S. safety net programs. Evidence remains limited, however, on the extent to which work requirements increase economic self-sufficiency or screen out vulnerable individuals. Using linked administrative data on food stamps (SNAP) and earnings with a regression discontinuity design, we find robust evidence that work requirements increase program exits by 23 percentage points (64 percent) among incumbent participants after 18 months. There is a 53 percent overall reduction in program participation among adults who are subject to work requirements. Homeless adults are disproportionately screened out. We find no effects on employment, and suggestive evidence of increased earnings in some specifications. Our findings indicate that, per dollar of public expenditure, eliminating work requirements would likely transfer more resources to low-income adults than other programs targeting the same population.
28877.zh_abstract: 工作要求在美国安全网项目中十分普遍。然而，关于工作要求在多大程度上能提高经济自给自足或筛选出弱势个体的证据仍然有限。利用食品券（SNAP）与收入的关联行政数据，结合断点回归设计，我们发现强有力的证据表明，在现有参与者中，工作要求在18个月后使项目退出率提高了23个百分点（64%）。在受工作要求约束的成年人中，项目参与总体减少了53%。无家可归的成年人被不成比例地筛选出去。我们未发现对就业的影响，但在某些设定中，有提示性证据表明收入有所增加。我们的研究结果表明，按每美元公共支出计算，取消工作要求可能比针对同一人群的其他项目将更多资源转移给低收入成年人。
